**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

1\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
  
  

Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
  
Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
  
Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
  
Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
  
Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
  
Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
  
Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities
  
͏
  
  

2\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
  
  

Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
  
Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
  
Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
  
Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
  
Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
  
Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
  
Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
  
Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
  
Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
  
Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders
  
͏
  
  

3\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
  
  

Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
  
Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
  
Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
  
Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
  
Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
  
Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
  
Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
  
Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally
  
͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No. Performance Parameter Measure
  
1\. Continuous Integration, Deployment \& Monitoring of Software 100% error free on boarding \& implementation, throughput %, Adherence to the schedule/ release plan
  
2\. Quality \& CSAT On\-Time Delivery, Manage software, Troubleshoot queries, Customer experience, completion of assigned certifications for skill upgradation
  
3\. MIS \& Reporting 100% on time MIS \& report generation
  
  

**Mandatory Skills:** Oracle Acc Reconciliation Cloud Services .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .

Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. title: OTM-Consultant / Manager/ Architect
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


We are looking for experienced OTM Consultants with strong expertise in Oracle Transportation Management (OTM) implementation, configuration, and integration. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on experience in both functional and technical aspects of OTM across multiple modules.


* Strong functional system configuration skills in core OTM functionality and all modules including:
* Shipment Planning \& Execution
* Freight Settlement
* Sourcing
* Fleet Management
* Experience in B2B Integration using various standards and methods (EDI, API).
**Your Profile**
----------------


* Excellent customer service, team building, and conflict resolution skills.
* Ability to handle multiple workstreams and delegate appropriately.
* Experience in both development and support projects.
* Knowledge of solution design and system architecture.
**What you'll love about working with us**
------------------------------------------


We value flexibility and support a healthy work\-life balance through remote and hybrid work options.


Competitive compensation and benefits.


Career development programs and certifications in cloud technologies.


A diverse and inclusive workplace that fosters innovation and collaboration.


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.


Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


The Ivalua Consultant is responsible for the design, implementation, configuration, and management of **Ivalua Source‑to‑Pay (S2P)** solutions. Depending on the level, the role ranges from execution support and configuration to solution architecture, delivery ownership, and people leadership.


**Core Responsibilities (Applies Across Levels)**


* Implement and support **Ivalua S2P modules** including:
* + Sourcing
	+ Supplier Management (SIM)
	+ Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM)
	+ Procure‑to‑Pay (P2P)
	+ Invoicing \& Spend Analysis
* Translate procurement and business requirements into Ivalua solutions
* Configure forms, workflows, approvals, and business rules
* Support integrations with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, others)
* Conduct testing (SIT/UAT), cutover, and go‑live support
* Prepare functional documentation and training materials
* Ensure adherence to best practices and solution quality standards
**Your Profile**
----------------


* Assist in requirement documentation and configuration
* Perform basic Ivalua setup and data validation
* Execute test cases and defect tracking
* Support post‑go‑live activities and issue resolution
* Basic understanding of S2P / procurement processes
* Exposure to Ivalua platform
* Strong documentation and learning aptitude

**Job Purpose:**  

Wipro is currently look for an experienced Program Manager to join our ranks. The Program Manager will be responsible for the overall technical transformation implementation at the client end.
  
  

͏
  
  

**Objectives of this role:**  

* Strategize, implement, and maintain program initiatives that adhere to organizational and client objectives.
* Develop program assessment protocols for evaluation and improvement of Digital Transformation projects.
* Maintain organizational standards of satisfaction, quality, and performance.
* Oversee multiple project teams, ensuring program goals are reached.
* Manage budget and funding channels for maximum productivity.


͏
  
  

**ÃÂÃÂ Roles and Responsibilities:**  

* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams and business stakeholders, including software engineers, data analysts, product managers, and operations teams, to design and improve end\-to\-end processes for operations.
* Lead process improvement initiatives by identifying areas for enhancement, conducting data analysis, and developing actionable recommendations as per the business and industry standards.
* Design and Drive large Transformation initiatives which may include automation, RPA, AI/GenAI, Chatbots, CX tools like agent assist, workflow orchestration, Quality management tools etc.
* Drive automation initiatives by leveraging technology and process optimization to streamline manual tasks and improve overall productivity.

͏

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of this role is to design the organisationÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs computer and network security infrastructure and protect its systems and sensitive information from cyber threats
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

1\. Design and develop enterprise cyber security strategy and architecture
  
  

a. Understand security requirements by evaluating business strategies and conducting system security vulnerability and risk analyses

information security programs and technology projects
  
  

c. Identify and communicate current and emerging security threats and design security architecture elements to mitigate threats as they emerge
  
  

d. Identify security design gaps in existing and proposed architectures and recommend changes or enhancements
  
  

e. Provide product best fit analysis to ensure end to end security covering different faucets of architecture e.g. Layered security, Zoning, Integration aspects, API, Endpoint security, Data security, Compliance and regulations
  
  

f. Demonstrate experience in doing security assessment against NIST Frameworks, SANS, CIS, etc.
  
  

g. Provide support during technical deployment, configuration, integration and administration of security technologies
  
  

h. Demonstrate experience around ITIL or Key process\-oriented domains like incident management, configuration management, change management, problem management etc.
  
  

i. Provide assistance for disaster recovery in the event of any security breaches, attacks, intrusions and unusual, unauthorized or illegal activity
  
  

j. Provide solution of RFPÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs received from clients and ensure overall design assurance
  
  

͏
  
  

i. Develop a direction to manage the portfolio of to\-be\-solutions including systems, shared infrastructure services, applications, hardware related to cyber risk security in order to better match business outcome objectives
  
  

ii. Analyse technology environment, enterprise specifics, client requirements to set a collaboration design framework/ architecture
  
  

iii. Depending on the clientÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs need with particular standards and technology stacks create complete RFPs
  
  

iv. Provide technical leadership to the design, development and implementation of custom solutions through thoughtful use of modern technology
  
  

v. Define and understand current state solutions and identify improvements, options \& tradeoffs to define target state solutions
  
  

vi. Clearly articulate and sell architectural targets, recommendations and reusable patterns and accordingly propose investment roadmaps
  
  

vii. Evaluate and recommend solutions to integrate with overall technology ecosystem
  
  

viii. Tracks industry and application trends and relates these to planning current and future IT needs
  
  

͏
  
  

2\. Stakeholder coordination \& audit assistance
  
  

a. Liaise with stakeholders in relation to cyber security issues and provide timely support and future recommendations
  
  

b. Provide assistance in maintaining an information security risk register and help with internal and external audits relating to information security
  
  

c. Support audit of security best practices and implementation of security principles across the organization, to meet business goals along with customer and regulatory requirements
  
  

d. Assist with the creation, maintenance and delivery of cyber security awareness training to team members and customers
  
  

e. Provide training to employees on issues such as spam and unwanted or malicious emails

We are looking for a dynamic Senior Manager – HR Managed Services to lead end\-to\-end service delivery across HR operations for global clients. The role will be responsible for managing a portfolio of HR Managed Services engagements, driving operational excellence, client satisfaction, and continuous improvement.

* Proven track record of managing large client accounts and service delivery teams.

title: UK Tax - Tax technology services - consultant II - Mumbai
description:
UK Tax \- Tax technology services \- consultant II \- Mumbai  

Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited (USI Tax) supports Deloitte Tax LLP and other member firm teams through integrated tax and technology services. As a Tax Technology Services Consultant II, you will help deliver product support, testing, and implementation coordination for tax technology solutions. This role combines user support, user acceptance testing, documentation, and issue management to help improve the experience of internal and external users.  

Work you'll do  

As a Tax Technology Services Consultant II on the Tax Technology team, you will be responsible for:* Provide support to internal and external users through email, phone, chat, and ticketing channels, including issue triage and resolution tracking
* Troubleshoot software, access, and authentication issues; document resolutions; and create knowledge base content for recurring issues
* Execute user acceptance testing activities, including test execution, defect logging, retesting, and feedback on user experience
* Create process flows, mock\-ups, and other simple visual materials to clarify requirements and support solution design discussions
* Support user onboarding, access management, documentation, implementation activities, and reporting of support metrics and process improvement opportunities

  

The team  

USI Tax’s Tax Technology team helps deliver technology\-enabled solutions that support tax compliance, reporting, and operational efficiency. The team works closely with business, product, and support stakeholders to improve tools, resolve user issues, and support implementation activities across tax workflows. This team is well suited to professionals who enjoy combining technology support, structured problem solving, and user\-focused delivery.  

Position Summary  

Join our Tax Technology team as a Tech Support Consultant and be the bridge between users and product — you'll attempt first line technical fixes, escalate issues to the support/product team when needed, own UAT, support project launches, and simplify documentation to deliver better outcomes for clients.  

Qualifications  

Required:* Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or Business Information Systems
* 1\+ years of experience in technical support, software support, customer service, project support, user acceptance testing, or quality assurance
* Experience using ticketing or case management tools to log, track, and resolve issues
* Experience using Microsoft Windows, Microsoft Excel, and Microsoft Word in a business environment
* Experience documenting defects, test results, process flows, user stories, process design documents, solution design documents, or user guides


Preferred:* Experience supporting tax technology, finance technology, or other enterprise applications
* Experience with user acceptance testing or quality assurance, including defect tracking and validation
* Experience working in an Agile delivery environment
* Experience with SQL or basic database concepts
* Experience with accounting, business management, or tax workflow processes

  

Location: Mumbai \|\|Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST  

\#CA\-SN
\#CA\-RA
\#CA\-SRV  


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. title: Associate Director – Communications
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
Cognizant is seeking an accomplished professional to join the India Communications team and shape its external narrative in India. Based in India and working closely with both the India and global communications teams, the Associate Director will help drive media relations, executive thought leadership, financial and earnings communications, and crisis response for one of the world's leading professional services and technology companies. This is a hands\-on role for someone who combines strong editorial craft with sharp media judgement.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Build and sustain strong media relations with mainstream, business and technology journalists across India.
  
Draft and edit a wide range of external materials to a high standard, including media pitches, op\-eds, executive statements, holding statements, press releases and backgrounders, ensuring a consistent voice and message across all outbound communications.
  
Develop and manage thought\-leadership program for C\-suite and senior executives, from ideation through to placement, shaping their profiles and points of view in priority media and forums.
  
Manage PR around financial results and earnings in close coordination with the India and global communications, investor relations and finance teams, ensuring accuracy, consistency and alignment with disclosure requirements.
  
Anticipate, prepare for and respond to reputational and crisis situations, developing holding statements, Q\&A and response plans calmly and credibly under pressure.
  
Partner with global communications, marketing, HR, business and regional teams to align India communications with enterprise priorities.
  
Work closely with in\-house teams to get the best out of PR agency partners.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12–15 years of experience in corporate communications, public relations or journalism, with a strong record in external and media communications.
  
Ideally, at least five years in a listed technology company, with an understanding of the disclosure sensitivities and rhythms of a public company.
  
Established, credible relationships with mainstream and technology journalists in India.
  
Excellent written and oral communication skills, with the ability to draft and edit op\-eds, statements, pitches and backgrounds that are clear, sharp and on\-message.
  
Demonstrated ability to develop thought leadership for senior executives.
  
Proven crisis and issues\-management capability, with sound judgement under pressure.
  
Comfortable working across time zones and in tandem with global teams.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Sharp media judgement paired with strong editorial craft.
  
Ability to stay calm, clear and credible under pressure.
  
Strong cross\-functional collaboration skills across global and regional teams.
  
  

A proactive, ownership\-driven approach to managing India's external narrative.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role's business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring a minimum of 3 days a week in a Cognizant office. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: AI Technical Delivery Leader | 17+ Years | PAN India
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**The Opportunity:**

Capgemini is looking for a high‑calibre **AI Delivery Leader** to drive end‑to‑end delivery of AI solutions, enterprise products, and reusable accelerators. This role is ideal for strong AI delivery managers experienced in product implementations, asset rollouts, customization, and integration with enterprise systems.


This role provides opportunity to


* Lead **transformative AI and cloud delivery programs** impacting global enterprises.


* Opportunity to **drive innovation and delivery excellence** in next\-gen technologies.


* Inclusive, collaborative environment that values **diversity and continuous learning**.


**Key Responsibilities:**


**Delivery Leadership (Primary)**


* Own delivery across scope, schedule, cost, and quality.


* Run governance, KPIs, RAID, and stakeholder reporting.


* Manage client expectations, reviews, and escalations.


* Conduct delivery feasibility, planning, and fit–gap analysis.


**Technology Awareness**


* Knowledge of GenAI, LLMs, traditional ML, agentic systems.


* Understanding of enterprise AI patterns, esp. Document Intelligence.


* Awareness of integration patterns with ERPs, workflow/rule engines.


* Cloud deployment lifecycle knowledge (Azure (preferred), AWS, Google cloud).


* RPA knowledge is a plus.


**Solution \& Problem****‑****Solving**


* Collaborate with solution architects and technical teams to ensure solution design aligns with business objectives.


* Oversee deployment strategies, CI/CD pipelines, and operationalization of AI solutions across Azure and multi\-cloud environments.


* Guide solution design at a high level (not hands‑on architecture).


* Contribute to reusable frameworks and accelerators.


**Our Ideal Candidate**
-----------------------


* 17–20\+ years in software engineering.
* Bachelor’s/master’s in computer science, Software Engineering, Data/AI, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* AI‑focused delivery manager with product/asset rollout experience.
* T‑shaped: breadth across tech, depth in delivery/product deployment.
* Ability to work across traditional \+ modern tech environments.
* Strong aptitude and self‑learning mindset.
* Strong experience in AI/ML or enterprise product delivery.
* Ability to manage complex enterprise environments.
* Fit–gap analysis and product/asset deployment experience.
* High learning agility and strong analytical/problem‑solving skills.
* Excellent communication and leadership presence.
* Preferably from strong AI/tech organizations; solid academic credentials.
* Strong knowledge of P2P processes

title: Golang Backend Developer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Job Description**
-------------------


**Job Title:** Golang Backend Developer (Software Engineer)


**Location:** Bangalore, Karnataka, India


**Job Overview:**


The Golang Backend Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services ecosystem. This role involves working closely with frontend teams, architects, and infrastructure teams to deliver robust, cloud\-native applications. The engineer will focus on building high\-performance APIs and microservices using Golang, ensuring system reliability, scalability, and security.


**Basic Qualifications:**


* 4 years of relevant software development experience
* Strong backend development experience using Golang
* Minimum 2–3 years of experience building and deploying cloud\-native applications

**Essential Job Functions/Responsibilities:**


* Design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain backend services using Golang
* Build scalable and high\-performance RESTful APIs and microservices
* Design and optimize data storage solutions using SQL databases
* Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user\-facing elements with server\-side logic
* Follow Agile/Scrum practices including sprint planning, stand\-ups, and retrospectives
* Analyze complex problems and propose efficient backend solutions
* Ensure code quality through best practices, unit testing, and code reviews
* Take ownership of features/modules and deliver high\-quality outcomes
* Work with DevOps teams for CI/CD, deployment, and monitoring

**Technical Expertise:**


* 5\+ years of experience in backend development with Golang
* Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems
* Experience designing and developing REST APIs and event\-driven services
* Hands\-on experience with SQL databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.)
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases (e.g., Cassandra, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch) is a plus
* Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerized deployments
* Experience working with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Knowledge of message queues/streaming systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
* Familiarity with OAuth 2\.0, JWT, and secure API design
* Experience with Git or similar version control systems

**Desired Skills:**


* Experience in building high\-throughput, low\-latency systems
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools such as Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana
* Understanding of caching strategies using Redis or Memcached
* Exposure to system design and scalability best practices
* Experience working in large\-scale distributed environments
**Job Description \- Grade Specific**
-------------------------------------


Focus on Digital Continuity and Manufacturing. Fully competent in own area. Acts as a key contributor in a more complexor critical environment. Proactively acts to understand and anticipates client needs. Manages costs and profitability for a work area. Manages own agenda to meet agreed targets. Develop plans for projects in own area. Looks beyond the immediate problem to the wider implications. Acts as a facilitator, coach and moves teams forward.
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.

title: Deputy Manager | Cloud Security Architect | Pune | Enterprise Security | Cloud Security
description:
Job requisition ID :: 107972
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Deputy Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Role: Cloud Security Architect (CISO)**

  

The Cloud Security Architect is a senior level professional position responsible for driving efforts to prevent, monitor and respond to information/data breaches and cyber\-attacks.


The overall purpose of this role is to ensure the execution of Information Security (IS) directives and activities in alignment with client's information and cybersecurity policy within the Technology Infrastructure.

 **Responsibilities:**


Identify opportunities to automate and standardize information security controls and for the supported groups.


Resolve any vulnerabilities or issues detected in an application or infrastructure.


Analyze source code to mitigate identified weaknesses and vulnerabilities within the system.


Review and validate automated testing results and prioritize actions that resolve issues based on overall risk.


Scan and analyze applications with automated tools, and perform manual testing if necessary.


Reduce risk by analyzing the root cause of issues, their impact, and required corrective actions.


Direct the development and delivery of secure solutions by coordinating with business and technical contacts.


Contribute to execution of the architectural vision for all IT systems through major, complex IT architecture projects.


Security Architecture: Collaborate with IT to ensure system architecture follows corporate policies and IT best practices.


Risk management: Identify, assess and mitigate security risks. Identify application compensating controls for non\-compliant items.


Provide technical leadership and is responsible for developing components of, or the overall systems design.


Translate complex business problems into sound technical solutions.


Provide integrated systems planning and recommends innovative technologies that will enhance the current system.


Recommend appropriate infrastructure platforms, and communication links required to support IT goals and strategy.


Impact the architecture function by influencing decisions through advice, counsel or facilitating services.


Guide, influences and persuades others with developed communication and diplomacy skills.

 **Qualifications and Education:**


Strong understanding of cloud security architectures (i.e. AWS Well\-Architected Framework, Google Cloud Security Command Centre).


Knowledge of the Identity and Access management (IAM) security models of AWS and GCP.


In\-depth knowledge of cloud infrastructure and architecture (e.g. VPC, EC2, S3, Cloud Storage and Compute Engine.


Familiarity with compliance and risk frameworks (NIST, ISO 27001, CSA STAR)


Experience in business engagement for Information Security, Risk or Control \& Compliance, IT Analysis / Design or Program / Project Management.


Perform Information Security risk assessments and familiarity with Information Security Risk Governance.


At least 2 years’ experience securing cloud environments particularly AWS and GCP


Bachelors degree or higher (Computer Science or Cybersecurity preferred) or equivalent work experience.


Industry certifications such as CISSP/CISM/CCSP are desired.


Have good communication skills with the ability to articulate clearly in high stress situations.


Self\-starter with good problem\-solving skills.


Proven influencing and relationship management skills.

* Familiarity with IaC security (Terraform, CloudFormation)


Advanced proficiency with Microsoft Office tools and software.


Public Cloud Solution Architect or Security Certifications are plus (i.e. AWS Certified Solution Architect, GCP Professional Cloud Security Engineer)

title: AWS Data Engineer
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* You will be a key contributor in designing and building robust scalable data solutions on AWS that power analytics reporting and data driven decision making
* In this role you will work with modern cloud native services to create secure high performing data pipelines and warehouses that serve multiple business teams
* With your experience you ll help shape best practices for data engineering optimize performance and ensure data reliability across the organization
* You ll collaborate closely with data analysts data scientists and product teams to understand their needs and translate them into efficient data models and ETL ELT workflows
* This is an opportunity to take ownership influence architecture decisions and continuously improve our data ecosystem while working in a collaborative learning focused environment

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Design develop and maintain scalable ETL ELT data pipelines on AWS to ingest transform and load data from diverse sources
* Build and optimize data workflows using AWS Glue ensuring reliability reusability and performance of jobs and crawlers
* Design implement and manage data warehousing solutions on AWS Redshift including schema design partitioning and performance tuning
* Implement data quality checks validation rules and monitoring to ensure accuracy completeness and consistency of data assets
* Collaborate with analytics and business teams to understand reporting and BI requirements and translate them into efficient data models and datasets
* Apply best practices for security compliance and governance across AWS data services including access control and encryption standards
* Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline issues optimize job performance and proactively improve system reliability and scalability
* Contribute to documentation standards and reusable frameworks for data engineering on AWS to support team wide efficiency and consistency

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Deep hands on experience with AWS Glue including job orchestration Glue Studio Jobs and integration with other AWS data services
* Strong experience with AWS Redshift including cluster management query optimization workload management and cost performance tuning
* Demonstrated track record of delivering end to end data engineering solutions on AWS for analytics BI or data science use cases
* Experience implementing data governance metadata management and data cataloging using AWS native or similar tools
* AWS related certification e
* g
* AWS Certified Data Analytics AWS Certified Solutions Architect or AWS Certified Developer is a strong plus
* Ability to work in cross functional teams communicate technical concepts clearly and mentor junior engineers on AWS data best practices

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Infosys is a global leader in next generation digital services and consulting
* We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation
* With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey
* We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change
* We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight
* Our always on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem
* Infosys provides equal employment opportunities to applicants and employees without regard to race color sex gender identity sexual orientation religious practices and observances national origin pregnancy childbirth or related medical conditions status as a protected veteran or spouse family member of a protected veteran or disability

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Cloud Platform\-\>AWS Database

title: TL-US Banking Check/Item Processing Implementation
description:
**Job title:** Team Lead – US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation
  
About the role
  
As a SME/Team Lead/Manager \- US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation,, you will make an impact by delivering implementation solutions across card and payments processing environments with a focus on US banking. You will be a valued member of the Cards \& Payments team and work collaboratively with clients, technical teams, and stakeholders to drive successful project outcomes and client satisfaction.
  
In this role, you will
  
* Lead and execute implementation activities across cards and payments solutions, ensuring alignment with client requirements and business objectives


Manage end\-to\-end implementation of item and image processing across merchant, mobile, teller, and ATM capture channels
  
Drive solutioning for Image Cash Letter processing, including duplicate detection configuration and exception handling
  
Collaborate with clients during US business hours to gather requirements, deliver training, and support go\-live and stabilization phases
  
Analyze data, identify risks or patterns, and proactively resolve issues while managing escalations and stakeholder communication
  
Work model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2\-3 days a week in a client or Cognizant office in PUNE / BANGALORE / CHENNAI/HYD/Kolkata/Ahmedabad India. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
What you need to have to be considered
  
* 5\-15 years of experience in US banking cards and payments domain


Strong knowledge of item and image processing, including merchant and mobile distributed capture workflows
  
Experience with Image Cash Letter processing and duplicate detection configuration and management

title: Appium Testing
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


Join our Quality Engineering team to drive mobile test automation and quality assurance initiatives across Android and iOS platforms. As an Appium Automation Engineer, you will design, develop, and maintain scalable automation frameworks while ensuring high\-quality software delivery through functional, UI, and API testing.


**Your Profile**
----------------


* Overall **7\+ years of IT experience**.
* **4\+ years of hands\-on experience in Mobile Automation Testing** (Android and iOS).
* Strong expertise in **Appium, Selenium, and Java**.
* Experience in **API Testing** using tools/frameworks such as Postman, Rest Assured, or equivalent.
* Strong understanding of automation framework design and implementation:
* + Hybrid Framework
	+ Data\-Driven Framework
	+ Keyword\-Driven Framework
	+ Behavior\-Driven Development (BDD)
* Good understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), STLC, test methodologies, and quality assurance processes.
* Experience in test planning, execution, defect tracking, and reporting.
* Strong debugging, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred Skills:**


* Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions.
* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Experience with cloud\-based mobile testing platforms (BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, etc.).
* Exposure to version control tools such as Git.
**In This Role, You Will**
--------------------------


* Design, develop, and execute automated test scripts for mobile applications (Android and iOS) using Appium and Selenium.
* Build and enhance automation frameworks including Hybrid, Data\-Driven, Keyword\-Driven, and Behavior\-Driven frameworks.
* Perform functional, UI, regression, integration, and API testing.
* Create and maintain reusable automation components and testing utilities.
* Develop tooling across the testing lifecycle, including test case management, test data generation, automated defect capture, and test reporting.
* Estimate, prioritize, plan, and coordinate testing activities across releases.
* Analyze test results, identify quality risks, and work closely with development teams for defect resolution.
* Integrate automation suites with CI/CD pipelines and quality reporting tools.
* Ensure adherence to SDLC processes, quality standards, and testing best practices.
**What You'll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on enterprise\-scale mobile automation initiatives.
* Exposure to modern test automation frameworks and DevOps practices.
* Collaborative and innovation\-driven engineering culture.
* Continuous learning and career growth opportunities.
* Flexible and dynamic work environment with global team collaboration.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: Senior Business Manager - Learning
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* Role Overview
* The Senior Business Manager Learning is a strategic leadership role within the Professional Skills Development function
* The role is responsible for shaping and driving enterprise wide professional and soft skills capability building with a strong focus on leadership readiness executive presence and business impact
* This leader will work closely with senior business stakeholders to design and deliver high impact learning interventions that enable current and future leaders across the organization

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Key Responsibilities
* Provide strategic and people leadership to a team of professional skills development faculty
* Act as a trusted learning advisor to Business Unit and senior leadership teams
* Lead the conceptualization design and execution of enterprise level professional skills and leadership development programs
* Personally facilitate and deliver advanced learning interventions for senior professionals managers and leaders
* Drive continuous improvement innovation and relevance of professional skills offerings in line with evolving business needs
* Ensure measurable business impact and high learner engagement across all programs
* Core Capabilities Skills
* Executive level facilitator with deep expertise in professional skills and leadership development
* Strong program design capability from needs analysis to delivery and impact measurement
* Proven ability to engage influence and partner with senior business leaders
* Exceptional communication coaching and executive presence
* Strong people leadership skills with experience building and mentoring high performing faculty teams

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Experience Qualifications
* 15 years of experience in corporate professional skills and soft skills enablement
* Significant experience delivering learning programs for senior leaders and executive audiences
* Demonstrated success in leading large scale high impact learning initiatives in complex organizations
* Who Should Apply
* This role is ideal for a seasoned learning leader who combines deep facilitation expertise with strategic thinking business acumen and the credibility to operate confidently at the senior leadership level

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Domain\-\>Learning Experience Design\-\>Learning Strategy

title: Five9- Lead Business Transformation Architect- Sales & Service- Customer
description:
**Customer**  

The Customer Team empowers organizations to build deeper relationships with customers through innovative strategies, advanced analytics, GenAI, transformative technologies, and creative design. We enable Deloitte client service teams to enhance customer experiences and drive sustained growth and customer value creation and capture, through customer and commercial strategies, digital product and innovation, marketing, commerce, sales, and service. We are a team of strategists, data scientists, operators, creatives, designers, engineers, and architects, balancing business strategy, technology, creativity, and ongoing managed services to help solve the biggest problems that impact customers, partners, constituents, and the workforce. We also offer Business Process as a Service, enabling organizations to streamline operations and achieve greater efficiency through scalable, technology\-enabled **Position Summary** **Level**: Lead Business Transformation Architect  

As a Lead Business Transformation Architect/ Specialist Master at Deloitte Consulting, you will drive the design, implementation, and delivery of cutting\-edge artificial intelligence solutions for our clients. This role combines deep technical expertise with strong leadership capabilities and exceptional client management skills. You will serve as a bridge between complex technical implementations and business objectives, leading development teams while effectively communicating with stakeholders at all levels. **Work you’ll do:**  

We are looking for a seasoned Five9 CCaaS Architect to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of enterprise\-grade cloud contact center solutions built on the Five9 Intelligent CX Platform. This is a senior technical role that sits at the intersection of solution architecture, AI\-driven automation, and client advisory — equal parts strategist and builder.  

The ideal candidate brings deep hands\-on Five9 expertise, a strong grasp of modern CCaaS architecture patterns, and the communication fluency to translate complex technical decisions into clear business value for clients and stakeholders.* Solution Design \& Architecture: Lead end\-to\-end CCaaS solution design — from discovery and requirements gathering through configuration, testing, deployment, and rollout. Translate business and operational requirements into scalable, secure, and high\-performing Five9 architectures that align with client goals and industry best practices.
* Technical Leadership \& Governance: Serve as the primary technical authority across multiple concurrent client engagements. Conduct solution and code reviews, establish architecture governance standards, and maintain quality assurance throughout the delivery lifecycle.
* Five9 Platform Configuration \& Deployment: Design and configure the full breadth of Five9 capabilities including VCC Core, ACD/IVR/IVA (Intelligent Virtual Agent) with complex call flows, outbound campaigns and predictive dialing logic, Workforce Automation (WFA), Quality Management (QM/WEM), digital channels, and AI\-driven features such as Five9 Genius AI.
* Integration \& Connectivity Architecture: Architect and implement enterprise\-grade integrations with CRM and ITSM platforms — including Salesforce, ServiceNow, Microsoft Dynamics 365, Oracle, and Zendesk — using Five9's pre\-built adapters and the Agent Desktop Toolkit Plus (ADT\+). 7 8 Design and implement REST/SOAP APIs, webhooks, and advanced scripting. Implement identity and authentication frameworks including SSO, SAML, and OAuth.
* AI \& Automation Strategy: Drive the adoption of Five9's Genius AI capabilities — including Intelligent Voice Assistants, AI\-powered Agent Assist, the AI Summary Node, Knowledge Node (RAG\-based), and the AI Trust \& Governance framework. Provide architectural guidance on deploying responsible, hallucination\-aware AI within the contact center environment. 9 10 Stay ahead of Five9's evolving Agentic CX roadmap and help clients position for next\-generation capabilities.
* Performance Optimization \& Reporting: Configure dashboards, real\-time reporting, and supervisor tools to monitor and continuously optimize contact center operations. Guide clients on best practices for scalability, performance, reliability, and security.
* Troubleshooting \& Incident Resolution
* Troubleshoot complex issues spanning application, platform, network, cloud, and telecom layers. Drive rapid resolution with minimal disruption to customer\-facing operations.
* Collaboration, Scoping \& Delivery: Partner with project managers for accurate effort estimation, scoping, risk management, and on\-time delivery. Lead and mentor engineers, consultants, and junior delivery team members to elevate technical capability and solution quality across the team.
* Client Engagement \& Presentations: Deliver compelling client\-facing presentations, solution demonstrations, and value propositions. Serve as a trusted technical advisor throughout the engagement lifecycle.

 **The team:**  

Our Sales \& Service team focuses on delivering marketing and growth objectives aligned with our clients’ brand values for measurable business growth. We help clients turn business values into measurable growth through creatively driven, personalized content, communications, and experiences that engage and inspire people to act. We implement and operate the technology platforms that enable personalized content, commerce and marketing user\-centric experiences. In doing so, we transform our clients’ marketing and engagement operations into modern, data\-driven, creatively focused organizations. Our team brings deep experience in creative and digital marketing capabilities by a combination of key focus areas i.e, Brand, Advertising, Experiences, Content, Marketing, Commerce, Products, Data and measurement/analysis. **Qualifications** **Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:*** 5\+ years of hands\-on architecture experience with the Five9 Intelligent CX Platform, including VCC, IVR/IVA, WFA, QM/WEM, and digital channels
* Advanced understanding of CCaaS architecture patterns, enterprise scalability design, and cloud contact center infrastructure
* Solid understanding of core contact center operations: ACD, IVR, CTI, and CRM integration workflows
* Experience migrating legacy on\-premise contact centers to Five9 cloud environments
* Proficiency in enterprise integration design using REST/SOAP APIs, webhooks, and scripting languages (JavaScript, HTML, CSS)
* Strong command of authentication protocols: SSO, SAML, OAuth
* Familiarity with AI/ML applications in CX — chatbots, virtual agents, predictive analytics, agent assist, and GenAI\-driven capabilities
* Awareness of compliance and security frameworks relevant to CCaaS: PCI\-DSS, HIPAA, GDPR
* Bonus: Server\-side development experience in Node.js, Java, PHP, or .NET
* Excellent communication and documentation skills with the ability to present confidently to executive and technical audiences
* Proven ability to lead, mentor, and develop delivery teams
* Strong client advisory mindset — able to frame technical decisions in terms of business outcomes

 **Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications*** Five9 Certifications: Five9 Certified Administrator, Five9 Certified Implementor, or Global Partner Certified Implementation Partner credentials are highly desirable
* AI/GenAI Certifications: A plus, given the growing centrality of Genius AI and agentic workflows in Five9 deployments

 **Education:*** BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Sc (CS) degree or equivalent from accredited university

 **Location:*** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

  

\#FY27REFERRALCAMPAIGNS  


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

**Job description**

  


**1\. Technical Accounting \& Advisory**


* Provide guidance on **complex accounting matters** such as revenue recognition, leases, financial instruments, business combinations, consolidations, and impairment assessments.

* Leadership qualities and experience supervising junior staff.
* High attention to detail and strong documentation discipline.

title: Manager | SAP ISU | Kolkata | SAP | DSA Oil, Gas and Utilities
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108430
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Kolkata
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Manager – SAP IS\-U Metering, Billing \& Collections**
--------------------------------------------------------

**Location:** Kolkata, West Bengal, India

**Role Level:** Manager

**Function:** IT / Digital Utilities / SAP IS\-U

**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

### **Job Summary**


We are seeking an experienced **Manager – SAP IS\-U Metering, Billing \& Collections** to lead the implementation, support, enhancement, and transformation of SAP IS\-U solutions for utility operations. The role will be responsible for managing end\-to\-end SAP IS\-U processes including **Device Management (Metering), Energy Data Management, Billing, Invoicing, Collections, Dunning, Payment Processing, and Customer Services** while working closely with business stakeholders, project teams, and external partners.


The ideal candidate should possess strong functional expertise in SAP IS\-U, team leadership capabilities, stakeholder management skills, and experience in large\-scale utility transformation programs.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

### **SAP IS\-U Functional Leadership**

* Lead the SAP IS\-U Metering, Billing, and Collections workstream for implementation, enhancement, and support projects.
* Manage end\-to\-end utility business processes including:
* Meter installation, replacement, and removal
* Device Management
* Meter reading and validation
* Billing and invoicing
* Collections and receivables management
* Disconnection and reconnection processes
* Payment processing and revenue accounting
* Drive solution design workshops and translate business requirements into SAP IS\-U solutions.
* Ensure system configurations align with business processes and regulatory requirements.

### **Metering \& Device Management**

* Configure and support SAP IS\-U Device Management.
* Manage meter lifecycle processes and meter reading operations.
* Support AMI/Smart Meter integrations and MDMS interfaces.
* Ensure accurate consumption data capture and validation.

### **Billing \& Revenue Management**

* Configure and manage tariff structures, rate determination, billing schemas, and invoicing processes.
* Handle complex billing scenarios including:
* Time\-of\-Day (ToD) Billing
* Net Metering
* Multi\-site billing
* Industrial and Commercial customer billing
* Monitor billing performance and revenue assurance processes.

### **Collections \& Customer Accounting**

* Manage SAP IS\-U FI\-CA processes including:
* Contract Accounts
* Receivables and Payables
* Dunning
* Collections Management
* Security Deposits
* Payment Processing
* Drive reduction in outstanding receivables and improve collection efficiency.
* Support integration with banking systems and payment gateways.

### **Project \& Team Management**

* Lead cross\-functional project teams and SAP consultants.
* Manage project deliverables, timelines, budgets, and risks.
* Work with business users to define process improvements and digital transformation initiatives.
* Mentor and develop functional consultants and support teams.

### **Stakeholder Management**

* Collaborate with utility business users, IT teams, vendors, and leadership stakeholders.
* Act as the primary functional point of contact for Metering, Billing, and Collections.
* Conduct UAT, training sessions, and change management activities.

### **Governance \& Compliance**

* Ensure adherence to utility regulations and industry standards.
* Support audit, compliance, and security requirements.
* Maintain process documentation, SOPs, and solution architecture artifacts.

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related discipline.
* MBA preferred.
* SAP IS\-U Certification will be an added advantage.

**Experience Requirements**
---------------------------

* 10–15 years of overall SAP experience.
* Minimum 7\+ years of hands\-on SAP IS\-U experience.
* At least 3\+ years in a Team Lead/Manager role.
* Experience in Utilities domain (Electricity, Water, Gas, or Energy Distribution).
* Strong experience in SAP IS\-U implementations, rollouts, support, and transformation programs.
* Experience managing vendor and stakeholder relationships.

**Technical Skills**
--------------------

### **Mandatory**

* SAP IS\-U Device Management
* SAP IS\-U Meter Reading
* SAP IS\-U Billing \& Invoicing
* SAP IS\-U Customer Service
* SAP IS\-U Contract Accounts Receivable \& Payable (FI\-CA)
* Collections \& Dunning
* Payment Processing
* Revenue Management
* Integration with SAP FI/CO

### **Preferred**

* SAP S/4HANA Utilities
* SAP Fiori
* SAP BW/4HANA
* SAP BTP
* Smart Metering/AMI Integration
* MDMS Integration
* SAP CRM for Utilities
* SAP CPI/PI/PO
* Revenue Assurance Solutions

**Leadership Competencies**
---------------------------

* Strong people management and team leadership skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced utility environment.
* Experience managing multiple projects simultaneously.

**Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)**
-------------------------------------

* Billing accuracy and cycle completion rates.
* Reduction in billing and collection exceptions.
* Improvement in collection efficiency and receivables management.
* Project delivery within budget and timeline.
* User satisfaction and process optimization metrics.
* System stability and SLA adherence.

**Preferred Industry Experience**
---------------------------------

* Power Distribution Utilities
* Electricity Boards and DISCOMs
* Smart Metering Programs
* Energy \& Utilities Organizations
* Utility Shared Services Centers

title: Docusign - Developer or Senior Developer
description:
DocuSign Developer
  
**Years of Experience:** 3 to 9 years
  
**Work Location:** Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Gurgaon, Noida, Kolkata, Cochin, Coimbatore
  
Notice Period – Immediate to 30 Days
  
  

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking a skilled and experienced DocuSign Developer to join our team and lead the design, development, and integration of DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in DocuSign APIs, templates, workflows, and system integrations, with a passion for streamlining digital agreement processes.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Design, develop, and maintain DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions.
  
Create and manage templates, envelopes, PowerForms, and custom workflows.
  
Integrate DocuSign with internal systems (e.g., Salesforce, SharePoint, SAP, etc.) using REST APIs and SDKs.
  
Collaborate with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
  
Ensure compliance with security and data privacy standards.
  
Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to DocuSign functionality and integrations.
  
Provide documentation, training, and support to end\-users and internal teams.
  
  

**Required Qualifications:**  

5\+ years of hands\-on experience with DocuSign eSignature and/or CLM.
  
Proficiency in DocuSign APIs (REST, SOAP) and SDKs (Java, .NET, Node.js, etc.).
  
Experience with OAuth, JWT, and other authentication methods.
  
Strong understanding of document lifecycle management and digital signature workflows.
  
Experience integrating DocuSign with platforms like Salesforce, Microsoft 365, or custom applications.
  
Familiarity with JSON, XML, and scripting languages (JavaScript, Python, etc.).Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.
  
  

**Preferred Qualifications:**  

DocuSign Developer Certification(s).
  
Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
  
Experience with other eSignature platforms is a plus.

description:
Job requisition ID :: 108443
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Kolkata
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Deloitte****.**



Be audacious in impact



When was the last time you **thought the unthinkable, defined the unfathomable**, or did what no one else has dared to try?



At Deloitte, we're creating bold new frontiers for our clients and communities. Our roar echoes across India and beyond. So, bring your unique self and rise louder and leap further than ever before.


**Manager \| SAP FICO\| Kolkata\| SAP**


* **Job requisition ID:** 108433
* **Location:** Kolkata
* **Entity:** Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP


**The team**



Enterprise technology must do much more than keep the wheels turning; it is the engine that drives functional excellence and the enabler of innovation and long\-term growth. Learn more about ET\&P


**Your work profile**


* As an experienced SAP FICO Manager with strong expertise in SAP IS\-U (Industry Solution Utilities) to lead finance transformation initiatives, support business operations, and drive SAP S/4HANA roadmap activities. Should possess deep functional knowledge of SAP Finance and Controlling modules and hands\-on experience integrating SAP FICO with SAP IS\-U processes in utility organizations.
* Key responsibilities should:


**SAP FICO Functional Leadership**


* Lead the implementation, enhancement, and support of SAP FI and CO modules.
* Configure and support:
* General Ledger (GL)
* Accounts Payable (AP)
* Accounts Receivable (AR)
* Asset Accounting (AA)
* Bank Accounting
* Cost Center Accounting
* Profit Center Accounting
* Internal Orders
* Product Costing
* Profitability Analysis (COPA)
* Manage month\-end and year\-end financial closing activities within SAP.


**SAP IS\-U Integration**


* Design and support integration between SAP FICO and SAP IS\-U.
* Work closely with business teams on:
* Billing and Invoicing
* Contract Accounts Receivable \& Payable (FI\-CA)
* Meter\-to\-Cash processes
* Revenue Accounting
* Collections and Dunning
* Ensure seamless financial postings from IS\-U billing processes into SAP FI/CO.


**Project \& Stakeholder Management**


* Lead requirement gathering workshops with business stakeholders.
* Translate business requirements into functional specifications.
* Manage SAP implementation, rollout, upgrade, and support projects.
* Coordinate with technical, basis, ABAP, and cross\-functional teams.
* Drive UAT, training, deployment, and hypercare activities.


**Team Management**


* Lead and mentor SAP FICO consultants and analysts.
* Review solution quality and ensure adherence to SAP best practices.
* Manage resource planning, project timelines, and deliverables.


**Governance \& Compliance**


* Ensure compliance with financial controls, audit requirements, and regulatory standards.
* Support statutory reporting, taxation, and financial governance processes.
* Establish SAP support and change management procedures.

  


**Key skills required**.


* 10\+ years of SAP FICO implementation/support experience.
* Minimum 3–5 years of SAP IS\-U/FI\-CA experience.
* Strong expertise in: SAP FI, SAP CO, SAP FI\-CA, IS\-U Billing Integration
* Experience in at least 2 end\-to\-end SAP implementation projects.
* Strong understanding of utility industry business processes.
* Experience with business process analysis, solution design, and stakeholder management.
* SAP S/4HANA Finance experience.
* SAP Fiori exposure.
* Experience in SAP Central Finance.
* Knowledge of GST, Indian taxation, and statutory compliance.
* Experience in utilities, power distribution, water, gas, or energy sectors.
* Graduate degree (Science or Engineering) – B.Sc ( I.T), B.Sc ( Computer Science ) , B.E/B.Tech or MBA

  


**You bring you**



That's all we ask. And in return, we'll create an enabling and respectful environment. That includes reasonable accommodation for Fate unique needs.

  


**Your bold odyssey starts here**



Our story starts with your success: Experience excellence in an environment that is meritorious, respectful, collaborative, and empowering. One that is a catalyst of 360\-degree happiness for you and your loved ones.



Get right skilled for tomorrow: Get equipped to fuel transformative change and be the best in the industry. Don't just learn new skills, but be the engine of innovation, with clutter\-breaking solutions and practices.



Power the nation's growth story: We're Indian\-owned and led and working towards India's future. Our team spans and creates impact for the country, well beyond its urban centers. We move ahead along with the communities in which we operate, thereby giving you a profession with a strong sense of purpose.

title: Oracle Cloud Integration Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Integration \- Consultant, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As an Oracle Cloud Integration Consultant within Managed Services, you will support the design, development, and ongoing management of integration solutions that connect Oracle Cloud applications with enterprise and third\-party systems. Working with experienced advisors and technical specialists, you will help deliver scalable solutions, support reliable data movement across platforms, and contribute to operational improvement and business transformation through managed services delivery.

**Level**: Consultant or equivalent


As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Consultant, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Designing, developing, and supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations between Oracle Cloud applications and enterprise or third\-party systems
* Building and maintaining inbound and outbound integration flows using Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, BI Publisher extracts, and File\-Based Data Import processes for Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud
* Using Structured Query Language, Procedural Language/Structured Query Language, XML Schema Definition, Web Services Description Language, and Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations to support data movement, transformation, and interface development
* Monitoring, debugging, migrating, and optimizing integrations, including large\-file handling, encryption and decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments, and issue resolution
* Providing production support across incident, problem, and enhancement management activities, including queue monitoring, ticket updates, service\-level agreement tracking, and coordination with stakeholders and delivery teams

**The team**


Enterprise Performance


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 3\-6 years of experience designing, developing, or supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations
* Experience designing and developing Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud integrations using Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and File\-Based Data Import uploads
* Experience extracting Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud data using BI Publisher reports within Oracle Integration Cloud
* Experience providing technical development support for inbound and outbound Oracle Integration Cloud integrations
* Experience with Structured Query Language, Procedural Language/Structured Query Language, XML Schema Definition, Web Services Description Language, Simple Object Access Protocol services, Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations, and Representational State Transfer services
* Experience with Oracle Integration Cloud monitoring, debugging, migration, large\-file handling, and encryption or decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments
* Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university

Preferred:

* Experience with Oracle Visual Builder and Oracle Integration Cloud customizations
* Experience supporting Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning, Human Capital Management, or third\-party application integrations
* Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, problem, and enhancement management
* Experience providing production support, including queue monitoring, ticket management, service\-level agreement tracking, and issue resolution
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
