title: GSA Solution Architect
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
  

Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth.
  
  

At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
  

About The Role
  
  

As a Deal Solution Architect , you will play a critical role in driving digital transformation for our clients in India. You will be responsible for architecting winning solutions for large and medium sized deals (USD 25 to 50 million) in both the private and public sectors. This role requires a deep understanding of various technologies, strong collaboration skills, and the ability to navigate complex RFP processes.
  
  

As a key member of the team, you will collaborate closely with technical experts, delivery partners, commercial teams, legal, finance, contract management teams, and customer stakeholders to develop compelling and competitive solutions. You will have the opportunity to influence strategic deal pursuits, optimize technical and commercial outcomes, and contribute to business growth while working in a dynamic and fast\-paced environment.
  
  

In This Role, You Will
  
  

Analyze RFPs and lead QandA sessions with customers alongside technical experts.
  
Develop compelling and competitive solutions that align with organizational guidelines and leverage best practices.
  
Collaborate effectively with multiple technical teams delivery partners commercial legal finance and contract management teams.
  
Manage solution versions integrate components from various technical towers and ensure a cohesive final response.
  
Optimize estimations technical solutions and project costs.
  
Own the final solution response and ensure its completeness.
  
Share effort and cost details with finance for commercial solution development.
  
Support the commercial team in deal negotiations and auctions.
  
Assist legal contract and delivery teams in drafting Statements of Work (SOWs).
  
Communicate deal summaries to leadership and present solutions to internal review boards.
  
Defend solutions with customers and manage risks associated with the solution development process.
  
Model SLA penalties and analyze commercial risks.
  
Design RACI matrices across internal teams partners and customers.
  
Report deal unit economics and benchmark against organizational guidelines.
  
Embrace our vibrant culture by striving for excellence, focusing on meaningful outcomes, and collaborating effectively. Take ownership, build relationships, and focus on personal growth to drive business strategy and foster an inclusive culture, creating unmatched career opportunities and impactful work.
  
  

What You Must Have To Be Considered
  
  

Proven experience in architecting solutions for large scale digital transformation projects.
  
Strong understanding of ERP implementations and other platform\-based solutions (e.g. SAP RISE Salesforce ServiceNow).
  
Experience with multi tower multi\-year IT outsourcing engagements.
  
Familiarity with hybrid cloud architectures ( VPC Network Connectivity DC DR Compute \& Storage types Security ) modern data architectures and observability concepts.
  
Understanding of API management cybersecurity principles and agile methodologies.
  
Knowledge of different commercial models (effort\-based task catalog outcome based etc.).
  
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  
Ability to work calmly under pressure and manage competing priorities.
  
Proficiency in Office 365 especially MS Excel.
  
Experience with Low\-Code No\-Code platforms.
  
Knowledge of bot\-based solutions and automation in software engineering or application support.
  
Familiarity with Generative AI and its application in automating daily work.
  
TOGAF
  
A strong sense of ownership, desire to create meaningful outcomes, and passion for work that serves a greater good for customers, communities, or global challenges.
  
**The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of:** Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The Right Thing, \& Own It.
  
  

These Will Help You Succeed
  
  

Strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills across technical, commercial, and business teams.
  
Ability to manage complex deal pursuits with multiple workstreams and dependencies.
  
Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.
  
Experience presenting solutions to leadership teams and governance boards.
  
Ability to balance technical, commercial, and contractual considerations while designing solutions.
  
Strong negotiation support and risk management capabilities.

title: Talend Admin
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* Experienced Senior Talend ETL Administrator with 5 years of expertise in designing implementing and managing enterprise data integration platforms
* Proven track record managing complex multi environment Talend deployments Dev Test Prod supporting mission critical data pipelines
* Expert in Talend Administration Center job scheduling performance optimization and CI CD integration

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Support and manage Talend environments across Development Test and Production
* Perform basic Talend Administration Center tasks such as simple scheduling updates deployments support and user access management
* Assist with deployments and release processes
* Check for job failures or delays and coordinate with development teams to resolve issues
* Support performance checks and help with simple job or configuration improvements
* Maintain platform stability by supporting patch updates connector management and version upgrades under guidance
* Carry out routine operational activities including log checks environment validation and execution reports
* Follow security and access control guidelines and ensure compliance with organizational policies
* Support backup recovery and disaster recovery activities as part of standard operations
* Update documentation and runbooks and contribute to continuous improvement of platform operations

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Talend Administration
* Hands on experience with Talend for administration and support activities
* Working knowledge of ETL concepts and data integration processes
* Exposure to AWS cloud services used in data platform environments
* Basic understanding of enterprise data platforms and how ETL jobs interact with downstream systems
* Familiarity with deployment pipelines CI CD processes and release coordination
* Ability to perform routine operational tasks troubleshoot issues and follow defined support procedures
* Clear and professional communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively within a team
* Perform effectively in fast paced production support environments
* Qualifications
* Bachelor s or master s degrees in computer science Information Technology Engineering or related field

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Infosys is a global leader in next generation digital services and consulting
* We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation
* With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey
* We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change
* We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight
* Our always on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem
* Infosys provides equal employment opportunities to applicants and employees without regard to race color sex gender identity sexual orientation religious practices and observances national origin pregnancy childbirth or related medical conditions status as a protected veteran or spouse family member of a protected veteran or disability

title: Capital Projects GCC Leader
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


The Capital Projects GCC Leader will drive the presales strategy for large capital projects across Energy \& Utilities, leading opportunity shaping, qualification, and full pursuit lifecycle management. They will mentor and scale an India based SME/ pre\-sales team, enhancing solutioning, proposal development, and storytelling capabilities. The role requires building strong C\-suite relationships to shape early\-stage demand and position the organisation as a strategic transformation partner. The leader will develop differentiated value propositions, orchestrate cross global teams for competitive bids, and steer governance across major pursuits. They will also represent the organisation in key industry forums to strengthen thought leadership and market visibility. Key Responsibilities
* Lead pre\-sales strategy for the capital\-projects portfolio across Energy \& Utilities, driving opportunity shaping, qualification, and high\-quality pursuit execution.
* Set\-up, lead and mentor the India\-based sales team, strengthening solutioning, proposal development, and storytelling capabilities.
* Drive full pursuit lifecycle\- from opportunity identification to RFP response, solution orchestration, orals preparation, BAFO, and contract negotiation.
* Develop C\-suite level relationships across utilities, power, nuclear, and infrastructure clients shaping early\-stage demand and positioning the organisation as a strategic transformation partner.
* Develop differentiated value propositions combining engineering services, digital/AI\-enabled delivery, and scalable global\-delivery constructs.
* Chair pursuit governance (war rooms, solution reviews, win strategy workshops) and ensure commercial, legal, and technical alignment for all large deals.
* Partner with global teams (delivery, solution architecture, pricing, finance, ER\&D, Invent) to craft compelling, competitive, and defensible bid responses.
* Drive creating repeatable sales\-enablement assets (playbooks, benchmarks, competitive insights), while ensuring clear synergy with the GCC India sales engine.
* Represent the organisation, from Capital Projects stand\-point at major industry forums, driving thought leadership and enhancing market visibility.

**Primary Skills**
------------------


* 20\+ years of experience in Energy \& Utilities sales, capital project solutions, engineering services, infrastructure programmes, or EPC/EPCM advisory.
* Demonstrated success closing large, multi\-million\-dollar capital project or engineering deals.
* Strong CXO level network across utilities, energy networks, water companies, transmission/distribution, or infrastructure agencies.
* Proven experience in running high performing sales teams or setting up GCC/GBS sales/solutioning organizations.
* Track record of leading complex global RFPs, orals, negotiations, and competitive bid cycles.
* Strong understanding of project controls, engineering workflows, digital/AI enabled project models, and capital project operating frameworks.
* Exceptional communication, and executive presence.

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The Configuration co\-ordinator is focused on managing and maintaining the Configuration Management System and the Configuration Management Database (CMDB).
  
The Configuration Management co\-ordinator watches over the integrity of the CMDB and associated libraries. As an assistant to the Configuration Management Process Manager they report directly to him.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
The roles and responsibilities defined below indicate the co\-ordinator as well as the configuration managers roles, rolled into one.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ The Configuration Manager is responsible for maintaining information about Configuration Items required in delivering IT services.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Maintains a logical model, containing the components of the IT infrastructure (CIs) and their associations.
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that all CIÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs are accurately registered
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Interfacing with other support organizations to ensure the effective use of the CMDB and Configuration Management System
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Maintaining and recommending improvements to facilitate effective use and integrity of the CMDB
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Creating reports and analyses the CMDB when requested by the Configuration Manager
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that CI Owners maintain adequate Configuration Management process disciplines and systems for the CIs they own
  
ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ¢ Ensuring that authorized procedures and work practices are followed

Assist in conducting audits

title: Manager | Financial Due Diligence | Delhi | M&A-Transaction Diligence, Execution & Reporting
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108525
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Delhi
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Manager \| Financial Due Diligence \| Delhi \| M\&A\-Transaction Diligence, Execution \& Reporting**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 108525
* **Location**: Delhi
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
  


**The team**



The Deloitte Transaction Services team consists of highly skilled and experienced professionals dedicated to providing companies with customized investment banking services. Our team of client focused industry leaders is committed to working to address the range of client transactions.

  



Deloitte’s global Transaction Services teams advise clients ranging from entrepreneurially\-owned businesses, corporates, private equity, and institutional investors to governments, management teams, and individuals. This global scale and connectivity, combined with local market insight and industry knowledge, underpin the integrated solutions that Deloitte's Transaction Services teams consistently deliver for clients. As part of the larger Deloitte network of member firms, our clients also have access to a full suite of professional services to address their needs through the transaction lifecycle and beyond.

  



We apply our experience in Transaction Services events— from capital raises, mergers and acquisitions and reorganizations and strategic wind ups — to help clients emerge stronger and more resilient. Our market\-leading teams’ help clients embrace complexity to accelerate performance, disrupt through innovation, and lead in their industries. Learn more about our Strategic, Risk \& Transaction Practice

  


**Your work profile**



As Manager in our **Transaction Services** team you’ll build and nurture positive working relationships with teams and clients with the intention to exceed client expectations:

  


* Developing an understanding of the target business and its drivers


* Assess data accuracy and reasonableness and follow\-up directly with clients and third\-parties appropriately to achieve necessary understanding and to resolve anomalies


* Performing financial analysis on data provided and arriving at conclusions / identifying issues.


* Interpretation, evaluation, and analysis of publicly available information on the target businessPreparation of quality deliverables (including Excel and PowerPoint documents) within agreed timescales, briefing Manager/ Deputy Manager accordingly.


* Identifying key issues in the areas worked on and reporting it to the Manager/ supervisor on a timely basis


* Work on a variety of deals ranging from large cross border transaction across various industry verticals Establishing credibility with clients/targets as a representative of Deloitte Transaction Services.


* To provide support/assistance for proposals/business development activities.

  


**Key skills required:**



In order to be considered for the role, your competencies will cover the broad scope of business modelling services, leveraging your professional background and skills such as:


* Chartered Accountant (qualified in first or second attempt preferred) with good academic background and 0\-2 years of relevant post qualification work experience.


* Having Audit or related articleship experience would be an advantage.


* Transaction experience/exposure would be an advantage.


* Knowledge of the Indian GAAP, knowledge of IFRS would be an added advantage.


* Strong analytical skills with proficiency in using MS\-excel to process and analyze large volume of data.


* Strong commercial acumen and market awareness


* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.


* Base location can be any Deloitte office across PAN India


* This profile involves frequent travelling to client locations.



Hybrid is our default way of working. Each domain has customised the hybrid approach to their unique needs

title: AUTOSAR BSW Diagnostics Engineer
description:
**Short Description**
---------------------


Join a team working on next\-generation automotive embedded systems. As an AUTOSAR BSW Engineer, you will contribute to the development and integration of critical Basic Software modules, enabling reliable and high\-performance communication and diagnostics across automotive platforms.


**Your Role**


You will be responsible for designing, developing, and integrating AUTOSAR Basic Software components, ensuring seamless communication, diagnostics, and memory management across ECU systems. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to deliver robust and scalable embedded solutions.


**Location:** Bangalore / Chennai
  

**Experience:** 6–12 years


**In this role, you will:**


* Develop and integrate AUTOSAR Basic Software (BSW) communication modules, including Ethernet, SOME/IP, J1939, and CAN FD.
* Design and implement AUTOSAR BSW diagnostic functionalities, including fault handling and failure management mechanisms.
* Develop and optimize Non\-Volatile Memory (NvM) modules for efficient data storage and retrieval.
* Perform debugging, validation, and integration of BSW components to ensure system stability and performance.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to support system integration and issue resolution.
* Contribute to system architecture discussions and continuous improvement initiatives.

**Your Profile**


* Strong experience in AUTOSAR BSW development and integration.
* Hands\-on expertise in automotive communication protocols such as CAN, CAN FD, Ethernet, SOME/IP, and J1939\.
* Experience in diagnostics, fault handling, and failure management mechanisms.
* Good understanding of embedded systems and automotive software development lifecycle.
* Strong debugging and problem\-solving skills.

**About Capgemini in India**


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: AVP – Head of India Tech Consulting & Strategic Deals
description:
Leading at Cognizant
  
This is a Leadership role at Cognizant. We believe how you lead is as important as what you deliver. Cognizant leaders at every level: Drive our business strategy and inspire teams around our future. Live the leadership behaviors , leading themselves, others and the business. Uphold our Values , role modeling them in every action and decision. Nurture our people and culture , creating a workplace where all can thrive.
  
At Cognizant, leadership transcends titles and is embodied in actions and behaviors. We empower our leaders at every level to drive business strategy, inspire teams, uphold our values, and foster an inclusive culture.
  
The Role
  
Cognizant helps companies modernize technology, reimagine processes and transform experiences so they stay ahead in a fast\-changing world.
  
Our Cognizant consulting group is looking for a Head of India Tech Consulting \& Strategic Deals to join our journey. We are looking for a deep tech person with strong experience in AI consulting, along with a multi\-industry experience in the Indian market; a person who has worked with top tier clients and has a strong network in the industry.
  
As a member of our team, you will be responsible for leading the India consulting arm of Cognizant and helping the company grow by managing top tier clients, striking strategic deals; while building a high performing team.
  
The Consulting Partner role is pivotal in driving strategic IT consulting initiatives within our organization. With a focus on delivering exceptional client solutions, the candidate will leverage their extensive experience to enhance business operations and foster innovation. This role requires a deep understanding of IT consulting, ensuring seamless integration of technology solutions to meet client needs and organizational goals.
  
**Every choice we make aligns to our vision:** to become the pre\-eminent technology services partner to the world’s top companies.
  
At Cognizant, we are a high\-performing team with heart. Our solutions are in demand and we’re passionate about making a difference. If you have experience with the above, you are a selfless leader and are committed to a client\-facing environment; if you want to grow your career with a team that wants to build something great together, we want to hear from you! Apply now!
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Lead the development and execution of IT consulting strategies that align with client objectives and organizational goals.
  
  

Oversee the implementation of technology solutions ensuring they meet client specifications and enhance business operations.
  
  

Provide expert guidance on IT consulting best practices fostering innovation and efficiency within client organizations.
  
  

Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver comprehensive consulting services that drive business success.
  
  

Analyze client needs and develop tailored IT solutions that address specific challenges and opportunities.
  
  

Manage client relationships ensuring satisfaction and long\-term partnership through effective communication and service delivery.
  
  

Drive continuous improvement in consulting processes leveraging industry trends and insights to enhance service offerings.
  
  

Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations maintaining the highest level of professionalism and integrity.
  
  

Facilitate workshops and training sessions to empower client teams with the knowledge and skills needed for successful technology adoption.
  
  

Monitor project progress and performance providing regular updates to stakeholders and adjusting strategies as needed.
  
  

Utilize data analytics to assess the impact of consulting initiatives and identify areas for further optimization.
  
  

Support business development efforts by identifying new opportunities and contributing to proposal development.
  
  

Build, mentor, and inspire a high\-performing consulting team, fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.
  
  

Consistently demonstrate the Cognizant Way to Lead, which means operating with Personal Leadership (building trust, collaboration, and inclusion), Organizational Leadership (driving vision and purpose, demonstrating a strategic and enterprise mindset, and creating and communicating a bold direction that inspires purpose), and Business Leadership (exemplifying client focus, managing ambiguity with accountability and results, and operating with financial acumen).
  
  

**What you need to have to be considered:**  

20\+ years of experience working in IT consulting, AI \& deep tech; with a wide breadth of experience in multiple industries.
  
  

Possess extensive experience in IT consulting, demonstrating a deep understanding of Indian industry trends and client needs.
  
  

Have a proven track record of successful project management and client relationship building.
  
  

Exhibit strong analytical skills with the ability to develop and implement effective technology solutions.
  
  

Demonstrate excellent communication and interpersonal skills essential for managing client interactions and team collaboration.
  
  

Hold a relevant degree in IT business or a related field showcasing a solid educational foundation.
  
  

Show proficiency in data analytics tools and methodologies enhancing decision\-making and strategy development.
  
  

**Embodiment of the Cognizant Way to Lead:** Leading Self, Leading Others, \& Leading the Business.
  
  

**The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of:** Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The right Thing, \& Own It.
  
  

**These will help you succeed:**  

Proficiency in AI, data analytics, and ability to foster insight\-led decision\-making to maximise the consulting impact
  
  

Experience managing small and large scale clients, facilitating client workshops, executive advisory sessions, and transformation roadmaps that accelerate technology adoption.
  
  

A commitment to continuous learning and professional development, with the ability to stay current on emerging technologies, industry trends, and consulting best practices.
  
  

**Work model:**  

Based on this role’s business requirements, the work model will be finalised once you join and may require working from a client or Cognizant office in India as needed. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for the role may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Senior Manager - Field Marketing
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As a Senior Manager, Field Marketing within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will drive SEG's market presence through industry events, digital integrated campaigns, and ABM campaign coordination. Working in close partnership with Cognizant's ISL Field Marketing function, your focus will be on Service Line\-led event execution, end\-to\-end digital campaign delivery, and connecting SEG's content and subject matter experts into the broader field marketing engine.
  
You will bring together event management expertise and integrated digital campaign capability — spanning content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables — while coordinating closely with regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and Business Units to insert SEG into existing programmes rather than building parallel pipelines. This role carries a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities, and works in coordination with the Director, Portfolio Marketing, SEG.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own Cognizant, industry, and partner event execution — including Service Line\-led and funded engagements such as industry conferences, partner summits, and association events where SEG clients are present.
  
Map the full face\-to\-face event universe for SEG's target buyers and build an annual event calendar with clear business development objectives for each activation.
  
Curate target attendee lists for events in alignment with Service Line strategy, and manage all event logistics including agency coordination, venue, invitations, speaker preparation, on\-site coordination, and post\-event follow\-up sequences in Winzone.
  
Connect SEG into regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and BUs — identifying where SEG content and SMEs can be integrated into existing programmes.
  
Identify and facilitate SEG SME participation in external events, coordinating speaker briefing and talking\-point preparation with the Associate Director.
  
Manage partner co\-marketing event activations with AWS, Azure, and AI platform partners, tracking joint event pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
Plan and execute digital integrated campaigns end\-to\-end — spanning thought leadership, content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables.
  
Operationalize the ABM account strategy set by the Portfolio \& Content AD — briefing the central Cognizant campaign team on account priorities, messaging angles, and content requirements, while tracking execution against plan.
  
Coordinate with the GTM AD on post\-event lead capture and CRM entry in Winzone, and report on field marketing contribution to pipeline in weekly leadership reviews.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
10–14 years of B2B field marketing, event marketing, or integrated campaign management experience within IT services or technology consulting.
  
MBA (Marketing) preferred.
  
Proven experience planning and executing B2B events at scale — from industry conferences to Service Line\-led roundtables and partner activations.
  
Hands\-on experience running digital integrated campaigns including email, content, social, and webinars in a B2B technology environment.
  
Comfortable working within a matrixed field marketing structure — experience integrating into centralized or regional field marketing functions is essential.
  
Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple simultaneous events and campaign workstreams across geographies and time zones.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience running ABM programmes or briefing central campaign teams on account\-level priorities.
  
Familiarity with hyper scaler partner co\-marketing ecosystems including AWS, Azure, and GCP events and MDF programmes.
  
Prior exposure to BFSI, HCLS, P\&R, or CMT vertical marketing.
  
Ability to self\-start, manage competing priorities, and thrive in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment.
  
**Event Impact:** Successful execution of Service Line\-led events with measurable business development outcomes and pipeline contribution.
  
**Campaign Performance:** Effective delivery of integrated digital campaigns that drive awareness, engagement, and qualified leads.
  
**Regional Integration:** Seamless insertion of SEG content and SMEs into existing EMEA, APJ, and BU field marketing programmes.
  
**Partner Activation:** Strong co\-marketing execution with strategic hyper scaler partners resulting in joint pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
**ABM Execution:** Accurate and timely briefing of central campaign teams, with clear tracking of account\-level programme performance.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, with a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities. The role requires flexibility to coordinate across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Buyer
description:
Ambattur, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
  

**Role :** Infra, Admin, Facilities procurement
  
  

**Designation:** Senior Analyst/ Associate Executive
  
  

To buy for a region or a customer ensuring requirements for speed, cost, and quality are met
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Work as a part of Global Procurement team reporting to Category lead for all procurement under Admin procurement category.
  
To negotiate and close commercials \& Terms/conditions related to MRO/Infra/AMC with potential partners.
  
Ownership of partner Onboarding and Contract Management (SOW, MSA, NDA, Commercial Agreements \& similar legal \& subcontracting agreements)
  
Responsible for identifying partners, floating RFI/RFP, arranging bidding, negotiating terms and conditions for supply of required product as per SOW defined by user.
  
To ensure closure of all commercials transaction/partner finalisation as per HCL procurement Policy.
  
To benchmark commercials against current market trends and earlier purchase transactions.
  
Facilitate communication with/between partners, users and other stakeholders for technical discussions and partner evaluation.
  
Ensure approval notes for partner selection are prepared with supporting documentation and signed as per DOA.
  
To ensure that a partner’s product abides by all environmental safety awareness and compliances.
  
Track new requests received on daily basis to ensure timely action and its closure.
  
To prepare MIS and ageing report on periodic basis.
  
To conduct spend analysis to identify cost saving and partner consolidation opportunities.
  
Follow up with the vendors to ensure timely delivery of material. Levy penalty in case of delays.
  
Maintain proper documentation for receipt of quotes, proposals, cost analysis sheets, partner technical evaluation, management approval etc from compliance point of view.
  
Handle periodic audit queries on transaction closed and provide data/reply in response.
  
Manage relationships with internal and external stakeholders.
  
Skill Requirements
  
Good Commercial Acumen.
  
Knowledge of sourcing and procurement techniques and dexterity in “reading” the market.
  
Strong knowledge of MS Office, especially Outlook, PowerPoint, Excel, SAP, Ariba.
  
Aptitude in decision making and working with numbers.
  
Organizational agility to adapt and respond well to changing demands.
  
Excellent communication skills (written and oral) both in English and local language.
  
Other Requirements
  
Should have a minimum qualification of Graduation/BE, Post\-graduation in management/supply chain management is desirable.
  
Should have prior experience in IT Industry.
  
Should be well acquainted with infra equipment material. i.e. Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing, civil, interiors, Solar panels and its consumables etc.
  
Should have good knowledge about rates, database of vendors, market trends related to Infra and RE Procurement
  
Should be well\-versed in vendor management \& development
  
Strong knowledge of MS Office, especially Outlook, PowerPoint, Excel, SAP, Ariba.
  
Familiar with energy markets and its financial evaluation models, policies, local regulatory compliances across India landscape.

title: SME - Security Investigations, SIEM
description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
  

Job Description – Product Security Engineer / Product Cybersecurity Lead
  
  

Prepared in Standard HCL Format
  
  

Job Title
  
  

Product Security Engineer / Product Cybersecurity Lead
  
  

Location
  
  

Chennai / Bangalore / Noida / Hyderabad
  
  

Band
  
  

To be confirmed
  
  

Relevant Experience
  
  

7–12 Years
  
  

Reporting To
  
  

Engineering / Product Security Leadership
  
  

Role Type
  
  

Individual Contributor
  
  

1\. Role Introduction
  
  

HCLTech is looking for a dynamic Product Security Engineer / Product Cybersecurity Lead to strengthen product\-related cybersecurity initiatives across engineering and product teams.
  
  

The role will partner with development organizations to embed security\-by\-design practices, improve product security posture, drive awareness, and support secure engineering decision\-making across global teams.
  
  

This position will work closely with engineering and product stakeholders across the US, Hungary, and India, enabling proactive identification and remediation of security threats, vulnerabilities, and gaps throughout the product lifecycle.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
2\. Key Roles \& Responsibilities
  
Ensuring and driving product related security activities.
  
Increase product security awareness within the development team.
  
Analyzing, tracking and following product related threats, vulnerabilities, security gaps and desired solutions.
  
Maintain cyber security processes and monitoring systems/tools.
  
Support the development teams through security analyses and threat modelling.
  
Interact with worldwide engineering and product teams (US, Hungary, India).
  
Skill Requirements
  
3\. Qualifications / Requirements
  
Experience analyzing, detecting and remediating cybersecurity issues.
  
Experience in security, network, system administration, development, or equivalent knowledge.
  
In\-depth knowledge of various operating systems (Linux, Windows).
  
Practical hands\-on experience in a complex system development environment.
  
Strong product security knowledge and mindset (STIG, vulnerabilities, CVE tracking, security gap analysis).
  
Ability to analyze and evaluate the impact of changes, defects, and different technology choices.
  
Good English communication skills.
  
4\. Desired Characteristics
  
Demonstrates clarity of thinking to work through limited information and vague problem definitions.
  
Influences through others and builds direct and behind\-the\-scenes support for change.
  
Proactively identifies, facilitates and drives project obstacles or barriers on behalf of the team.
  
Other Requirements
  
5\. Preferred Technical Knowledge
  
Product security engineering
  
Threat modeling
  
Vulnerability management and CVE tracking
  
Security gap analysis
  
OS hardening and secure system design
  
Security monitoring and governance tooling
  
6\. Requisition Summary (Concise Version)
  
  

Role
  
  

Product Security Engineer / Product Cybersecurity Lead
  
  

Primary Skills
  
  

Product security, threat modelling, vulnerability analysis, CVE tracking, Linux, Windows, security analysis, secure engineering support
  
  

Core Responsibilities
  
  

Drive product security activities, improve development\-team security awareness, track threats/vulnerabilities/gaps, support threat modelling, maintain cybersecurity processes/tools, and collaborate with global engineering/product teams
  
  

Preferred Traits
  
  

Analytical thinking, influence without authority, proactive issue resolution, and the ability to work through ambiguity

title: Associate Director - GTM & Sales Enablement
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As an Associate Director, GTM \& Sales Enablement within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will serve as the critical bridge between the SEG marketing team and the sales community — and the operational engine behind every offering launch. Working closely with Service Line Sales leaders, offering teams, and the SEG corporate marketing lead, you will ensure every sales professional is equipped with the tools, knowledge, and confidence to position SEG's offerings compellingly in the market.
  
Beyond core sales enablement, you will own the cross\-functional launch project management that brings together offering teams, sales, and marketing to ensure every launch lands cleanly and on time. Customer marketing — including existing client engagement, cross\-sell campaigns, and reference program development — also sits within this role, making it the most sales\-proximate and operationally critical position within the SEG marketing team.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Act as the cross\-functional coordinator for all SEG offering launches — owning the launch plan, driving alignment across offering teams, sales, and marketing, and ensuring every launch is delivered on time with the right materials in place.
  
Build and maintain a launch readiness checklist covering sales enablement, CRM configuration, campaign briefs, web updates, analyst communication, and partner activation — proactively tracking milestones and escalating blockers.
  
Own and maintain the sales enablement content library — including battlecards, one\-pagers, solution decks, objection\-handling guides, and FAQs — ensuring all materials remain current, accessible, and actively adopted by the sales community.
  
Design and deliver enablement sessions for sales, delivery, and market teams, while tracking attendance and knowledge retention.
  
Manage customer marketing initiatives — existing client engagement, reference program development, and cross\-sell/upsell campaigns — in close coordination with the sales team.
  
Maintain the Winzone CRM configuration for all SEG offerings, ensuring accurate tagging, opportunity capture, and pipeline hygiene.
  
Build and monitor offering\-level pipeline reporting, delivering weekly pipeline reviews to leadership with insights on anomalies and coverage gaps.
  
Gather win/loss feedback from the sales team, synthesize insights, and route improvements to the Portfolio \& Content AD for messaging updates.
  
Manage partner co\-marketing coordination with AWS, Azure, and AI platform partners — covering joint content calendars, co\-sell activation timelines, and MDF utilization tracking.
  
Support analyst relations scheduling and briefing preparation in collaboration with the Analyst Relations and Portfolio \& Content AD teams.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12\+ years of experience in GTM, sales enablement, product marketing, or a revenue\-facing marketing role within IT services or B2B technology.
  
MBA (Marketing/IT) preferred.
  
Proven experience managing cross\-functional technology offering launches with structured program management across sales, product, and marketing stakeholders.
  
Solid understanding of IT services sales cycles and how marketing supports complex enterprise deals.
  
Experience creating and maintaining a sales enablement content library for technology services — a portfolio of past work is essential.
  
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, with the ability to manage launches, enablement, customer marketing, and partner coordination simultaneously.
  
Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, Winzone, or equivalent, along with pipeline reporting experience.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience with partner ecosystems including AWS, Azure, or GCP co\-sell and MDF programs.
  
Background in customer marketing or client advocacy programs.
  
Comfort working directly with senior sales leaders and translating their feedback into actionable content and process improvements.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities and thrive in a fast\-paced, matrixed, cross\-functional environment.
  
**Sales Enablement Impact:** High adoption of sales content and measurable improvement in sales team confidence and readiness.
  
**Launch Excellence:** On\-time, well\-coordinated offering launches with all enablement and campaign materials in place.
  
**Pipeline Health:** Accurate CRM configuration and consistent pipeline reporting that drives informed leadership decisions.
  
**Partner Activation:** Effective co\-marketing execution with strategic partners resulting in joint pipeline and visibility.
  
**Customer Engagement:** Strengthened client relationships through targeted cross\-sell campaigns and a robust reference program.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, with day\-to\-day proximity to the SEG sales community strongly preferred. The role requires flexibility to coordinate across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: C++ ADAS Developer
description:
Join a team working on advanced automotive safety systems and contribute to building next\-generation ADAS features. In this role, you will leverage your strong C\+\+ expertise and domain knowledge to develop intelligent, reliable, and safety\-compliant driving solutions.


**Your Role**
-------------


As an ADAS C\+\+ Developer, you will design, develop, and optimize ADAS functionalities aligned with global safety standards. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to implement predictive and behavioral models for advanced driving systems.


**Location:** Bangalore
  

**Experience:** 6–12 years


**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills:**


* Strong hands\-on experience in C\+\+ (C\+\+11 or above) for ADAS development.
* Proven experience in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS).
* Good understanding of ADAS standards:
* + NCAP
	+ ISO 26262
	+ UNECE Regulations (R79, R152, R157\)
* Experience with behavior modeling functions including:
* + Behavior prediction
	+ Potential object selection
	+ Predictive modeling
	+ Criticality assessment
* Strong expertise in advanced C\+\+ concepts:
* + Templates and template\-based inheritance
	+ STL and containers
	+ Lambda functions
	+ Exception handling
	+ Memory management
	+ Data structures and algorithms
* Hands\-on experience in Python scripting.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced environment.

**Added Advantage:**


* Experience with SCM tools such as GitHub.
* Hands\-on experience with unit testing frameworks like Google Test (gTest).
* Familiarity with Atlassian tools (JIRA, Bitbucket).
* Exposure to MATLAB scripting.
* Understanding of software design patterns.
**In this role, you will**
--------------------------


* Develop and enhance ADAS features using C\+\+ (C\+\+11 and above).
* Implement behavior model functions including prediction, object selection, and criticality assessment.
* Design and develop predictive models for real\-time decision\-making.
* Ensure compliance with ADAS standards such as NCAP, ISO 26262, and UNECE regulations (R79, R152, R157\).
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams for integration, validation, and optimization.
* Optimize performance, reliability, and scalability of ADAS solutions.
* Utilize Python scripting for automation and data processing.
* Participate in debugging, code reviews, and continuous improvement activities.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. title: Associate Director - Performance Marketing
description:
**Management Level:** 05 \- Associate Director Performance Marketing
  
  

**Location:** Hyderabad, Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore
  
  

**Must have skills:** Performance Marketing Strategy, Digital Campaign Management, Paid Media (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads), Marketing Analytics, Lead Generation, Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), Marketing Automation, CRM Integration (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho), Budget Management, Funnel Optimization
  
  

**Good to have skills:** P\&L Management, Marketing Attribution, SEO/SEM, Account\-Based Marketing (ABM), A/B Testing, Cross\-Functional Collaboration, Data Visualization \& Reporting
  
  

**Experience:** 15\+ years of experience is required
  
  

**Educational Qualification:** Master's degree Preferred
  
  

Job Overview
  
  

The Associate Director \- Performance Marketing will lead the performance marketing strategy and execution for programs, driving learner acquisition, enrollment growth, and marketing ROI across India. This senior leadership role combines strategic planning, digital marketing expertise, data\-driven decision\-making, and team leadership to scale demand generation efforts. The role requires building a high\-performing marketing function, optimizing the learner acquisition funnel, and collaborating with cross\-functional teams to maximize business impact.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Develop and execute the national performance marketing strategy for programs, aligned with business objectives, enrollment goals, and revenue targets
  
  

Own end\-to\-end digital acquisition efforts, including paid media, lead generation, campaign optimization, conversion tracking, and marketing performance management
  
  

Drive qualified lead generation and maximize enrollment conversions through data\-driven marketing initiatives
  
  

Manage and optimize multi\-channel campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, display networks, affiliates, and other digital platforms
  
  

Lead, mentor, and guide a high\-performing performance marketing team, including campaign managers, analysts, and agency partners
  
  

Collaborate with Sales, Program, Product, and Content teams to improve lead quality, conversion rates, and learner engagement
  
  

Analyze campaign performance, market trends, competitor activities, and learner behavior to continuously optimize acquisition strategies
  
  

Ensure marketing excellence through robust analytics, attribution models, budget optimization, forecasting, and reporting for senior leadership
  
  

Drive process improvements, marketing automation initiatives, standard operating procedures, and best practices within the performance marketing function
  
  

Required Experience, Skills, and Qualifications
  
  

Graduate with 15\+ years of experience in performance marketing, digital marketing, or demand generation, with at least 5 years in leadership roles within higher education, EdTech, or B2C learning programs (MBA preferred)
  
  

Prior experience in the EdTech industry required
  
  

Proven track record of scaling digital acquisition, optimizing marketing spend, and driving significant enrollment growth
  
  

Strong expertise in paid media, marketing analytics, attribution, and conversion optimization
  
  

Experience managing large marketing budgets and delivering measurable ROI
  
  

Familiarity with CRM platforms, marketing automation tools, web analytics platforms, and marketing technology ecosystems
  
  

About Us
  
  

Backed by a $1 billion investment over three years, Accenture launched its LearnVantage business in March 2024, providing comprehensive learning and training services to help organizations reskill and upskill their people and achieve greater business results in the AI economy. Powered by an AI\-native platform, Accenture LearnVantage offers learning strategy and design, personalized learning experiences, learning managed services and certifications, all supported by a robust partner network and access to more than 2,000 mentors around the world.
  
  

For more information, please visit www.accenture.com/learnvantage.

title: Senior Manager - Communications
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As a Senior Manager, Executive Communications \& Social within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will build SEG's executive visibility and client proof\-point library. You will own the social media and industry publication content programme for 15–20 senior SEG leaders, develop the case study and proof\-point narrative pipeline that powers sales conversations and campaigns, and prepare executives for external events, roundtables, and panel appearances.
  
This is a specialist writing and communications role — not a general content marketing position. The ideal candidate writes convincingly in multiple executive voices, brings proven experience ghostwriting LinkedIn content for senior business leaders, and has a sharp editorial instinct for what engages a C\-suite audience. The role reports to the SEG Marketing lead and works closely with the Portfolio \& Content AD, with a dotted\-line relationship to the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader, SEG to ensure all output is on\-message and accurately reflects SEG's positioning.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own the social media and industry publication content programme for 15–20 senior SEG leaders — ghostwriting posts, articles, and commentary that reflect each leader's authentic voice while maintaining SEG's brand positioning.
  
Build and maintain a ready\-to\-deploy amplification kit — including pre\-written posts, repurposed content, and engagement prompts — that makes it easy for leaders to amplify SEG content consistently.
  
Develop a content calendar for executive social aligned to campaign moments, events, product launches, and key industry conversations, tracking performance and iterating based on C\-suite audience engagement.
  
Develop client case studies and proof\-of\-concept narratives following a problem → approach → outcomes structure, for use in campaigns, sales conversations, and analyst briefings.
  
Build a reusable proof point library — short, sharp client outcome statements organized by vertical, offering, and buyer persona — for use across marketing and sales collateral.
  
Work closely with the GTM AD to identify the case studies and proof points most needed by the sales team, and prioritize the production pipeline accordingly.
  
Support speaker preparation for events, roundtables, and external panels — developing talking points, anticipating audience questions, and supporting rehearsal sessions for senior SEG leaders.
  
Produce short\-form content assets including video scripts, demo narratives, event summaries, and client\-facing proof points that do not require lengthy approval cycles.
  
Collaborate closely with the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader, SEG and the Portfolio \& Content AD to ensure all content produced by this role is on\-message and accurately reflects SEG's positioning.
  
Support external writers and Cognizant's central content team with SEG\-specific context and briefing material as required.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
8–12 years of executive communications, corporate communications, or B2B content marketing experience within IT services, consulting, or technology.
  
MBA (Marketing/Communications) or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred.
  
Outstanding writing ability in English — must write convincingly in multiple executive voices; a published portfolio of executive social or corporate communications content is strongly preferred.
  
Proven experience ghostwriting LinkedIn content for senior business leaders — this is a non\-negotiable requirement for this role.
  
Experience producing B2B case studies and proof point narratives for technology or professional services.
  
Ability to build and manage relationships with senior executives — confident, organized, discreet, and capable of managing multiple leader relationships simultaneously.
  
Strong editorial instinct — a clear sense of what engages a CIO or CFO\-level reader on LinkedIn and in sales materials.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience preparing executives for conference appearances, media interviews, or analyst engagements.
  
Familiarity with LinkedIn's content algorithm and organic B2B performance optimization.
  
Background in AI, Cloud, Data Engineering, or ERP services marketing.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional, and matrixed environment.
  
**Executive Visibility:** Consistent, high\-quality social content that builds the personal brand and thought leadership of senior SEG leaders across LinkedIn and industry publications.
  
**Proof Point Impact:** A well\-maintained, sales\-ready library of client case studies and outcome statements actively used across campaigns and sales conversations.
  
**Content Quality:** On\-message, editorially sharp content that resonates with C\-suite audiences and reflects SEG's positioning accurately.
  
**Event Readiness:** Well\-prepared executives who deliver confident, compelling narratives at external events, roundtables, and panel appearances.
  
**Sales Enablement Support:** Timely delivery of proof points and case studies that directly address the needs of the sales community.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a remote\-friendly role based in Bangalore, requiring regular virtual collaboration with senior SEG leaders across India, the US, and the UK, with flexibility to accommodate different time zones as needed. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Consultant | SAP Basis | Kolkata | SAP | DSA Oil, Gas and Utilities
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108422
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Kolkata
Designation: Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Consultant – SAP Basis**
--------------------------

**Location:** Kolkata, West Bengal, India

**Role Level:** Consultant

**Function:** SAP Basis \& Technical Operations / SAP Platform Services

**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

**Position Summary**
====================


We are looking for a highly skilled **Consultant – SAP Basis** to manage, administer, optimize, and support SAP landscapes across development, quality assurance, pre\-production, and production environments.


The role will be responsible for SAP system administration, installations, upgrades, migrations, performance tuning, security management, transport management, high availability, disaster recovery, and cloud platform operations. The consultant will work closely with SAP functional, infrastructure, database, cybersecurity, and project teams to ensure stable and secure SAP operations.


The ideal candidate should possess strong hands\-on experience in SAP Basis administration for SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, SAP IS\-U, SAP BTP, SAP Fiori, SAP Solution Manager, and HANA databases.

**Key Responsibilities**
========================

**SAP Basis Administration**
----------------------------

* Administer and maintain SAP landscapes across Development, QA, UAT, DR, and Production environments.
* Perform SAP system installations, configurations, upgrades, refreshes, and migrations.
* Manage SAP application servers and system instances.
* Ensure optimal performance, availability, and reliability of SAP environments.
* Monitor SAP landscape health and proactively address issues.

**SAP HANA Administration**
---------------------------

* Support SAP HANA database administration activities.
* Perform:
* HANA Installation and Configuration
* System Replication Setup
* Backup and Recovery
* Database Maintenance
* Capacity Planning
* Performance Optimization
* Monitor HANA database health and utilization.

**SAP Upgrade \& Migration Projects**
-------------------------------------

* Lead Basis activities for:
* SAP ECC Upgrades
* SAP S/4HANA Conversions
* SAP Kernel Upgrades
* Enhancement Pack Implementations
* Unicode Conversions
* OS/DB Migrations
* Plan and execute technical cutover activities.
* Coordinate with project teams during implementation and go\-live phases.

**SAP Transport Management**
----------------------------

* Manage SAP Transport Management System (TMS).
* Coordinate transport movement across landscapes.
* Monitor transport schedules and resolve transport\-related issues.
* Ensure compliance with change management processes.
* Support emergency and production transport deployments.

**SAP Performance \& System Monitoring**
----------------------------------------

* Monitor SAP system availability and performance.
* Analyze:
* Work Processes
* Background Jobs
* System Logs
* Database Performance
* Interface Performance
* Perform performance tuning and optimization.
* Conduct root cause analysis for system issues and outages.

**SAP Security Administration**
-------------------------------

* Support SAP security and user administration activities.
* Manage:
* User Creation and Maintenance
* Role Assignments
* Authorization Management
* Password Policies
* Security Compliance Reviews
* Work closely with information security teams.
* Support audit and compliance requirements.

**SAP Fiori \& Web Technologies**
---------------------------------

* Administer SAP Fiori and Gateway environments.
* Configure and maintain:
* SAP Fiori Launchpad
* SAP Gateway Services
* Web Dispatcher
* SSL Certificates
* ICM Services
* Troubleshoot Fiori application and connectivity issues.

**SAP BTP \& Cloud Platform Support**
-------------------------------------

* Support SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) administration activities.
* Configure cloud connectivity services.
* Support integration with SAP Integration Suite and cloud applications.
* Monitor cloud\-based SAP services.
* Participate in cloud migration and modernization initiatives.

**Backup, Recovery \& Disaster Recovery**
-----------------------------------------

* Define and execute backup strategies.
* Perform system recovery testing.
* Support disaster recovery planning and drills.
* Ensure business continuity and high availability requirements are met.
* Maintain DR documentation and recovery procedures.

**Incident \& Problem Management**
----------------------------------

* Provide L2/L3 support for SAP technical issues.
* Troubleshoot:
* System Downtime
* Performance Issues
* Database Issues
* Transport Failures
* Interface Problems
* Perform root cause analysis and implement preventive solutions.
* Ensure SLA compliance for incident resolution.

**System Refresh \& Environment Management**
--------------------------------------------

* Perform:
* Client Copies
* System Copies
* Landscape Refreshes
* Tenant Administration
* Coordinate environment readiness for projects and testing activities.
* Support release and deployment activities.

**Monitoring \& Automation**
----------------------------

* Utilize monitoring tools for proactive administration.
* Automate routine Basis activities.
* Develop operational procedures and runbooks.
* Support capacity planning and infrastructure optimization initiatives.

**Documentation \& Governance**
-------------------------------

* Maintain:
* System Architecture Documents
* Installation Guides
* Operational Procedures
* Technical Runbooks
* Disaster Recovery Documents
* Audit Documentation
* Ensure adherence to SAP and organizational standards.

**Stakeholder Management**
--------------------------

* Collaborate with:
* SAP Functional Teams
* Infrastructure Teams
* Database Administrators
* Security Teams
* Project Managers
* External Vendors
* Participate in architecture reviews and technical governance meetings.
* Provide technical guidance to junior Basis consultants.

**Educational Qualifications**
==============================

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related discipline.
* SAP Basis Administration Certification preferred.
* SAP HANA Administration Certification is an added advantage.

**Experience Requirements**
===========================

* 4–6 years of SAP Basis administration experience.
* Minimum 4\+ years of hands\-on SAP Basis experience in complex SAP landscapes.
* Experience in at least 2 end\-to\-end SAP implementation, upgrade, or migration projects.
* Experience supporting SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, and HANA environments.
* Exposure to Utility (SAP IS\-U) environments preferred.

**Mandatory Technical Skills**
==============================

**SAP Basis**
-------------

* SAP Basis Administration
* SAP System Installation \& Configuration
* SAP Kernel Upgrade
* SAP Client Administration
* SAP Transport Management System (TMS)
* SAP License Administration
* SAP Solution Manager

**SAP Database Technologies**
-----------------------------

* SAP HANA Administration
* Database Backup \& Recovery
* HANA System Replication
* Performance Tuning
* Database Monitoring

**SAP Landscape Components**
----------------------------

* SAP ECC
* SAP S/4HANA
* SAP IS\-U
* SAP NetWeaver
* SAP Gateway
* SAP Fiori
* SAP Web Dispatcher

**Operating Systems**
---------------------

* Linux
* UNIX
* Windows Server

**Cloud \& Infrastructure**
---------------------------

* SAP BTP
* Azure
* AWS
* Google Cloud (Preferred)
* High Availability \& Disaster Recovery

**Preferred Skills**
====================

* SAP Cloud ALM
* SAP Focused Run
* SAP Integration Suite
* SAP Security Administration
* SAP Archiving
* SAP GRC Exposure
* SAP PO/PI Administration
* Automation \& Scripting (Shell, PowerShell)
* DevOps \& CI/CD Concepts

**Preferred Industry Experience**
=================================

* Power Distribution Utilities (DISCOMs)
* Energy \& Utilities
* Manufacturing
* Public Sector
* Infrastructure
* Telecommunications
* Large Enterprise SAP Transformation Programs

**Soft Skills \& Competencies**
===============================

* Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
* Ability to work under pressure during critical system incidents.
* Strong problem\-solving mindset.

title: Director - India Safety Authority (PSMS) - E1
description:
**Roles \& Responsibilites**
----------------------------


You will be a part of the Capgemini Engineering organization, a world\-wide leader in Engineering. As the ER\&D India Safety Authority, you will be responsible for the management and implementation of Capgemini Engineering’s Project Safety Management System (PSMS) related to safety in bids and projects in India. You will also be responsible for the development of the region’s safety capability and safety offer. You will be part of the overall PSMS Committee within the Capgemini Engineering Business Line (BL) reporting to the BL’s Global Safety Authority (GSA) and CTO. You will work closely with the global project office regarding the safety activities within projects.


The role requires experience in at least one safety related industry, on Functional Safety/System Safety Management and Engineering, strong leadership and excellent communication skills.


Key Responsibilties:


* To ensure that the PSMS is implemented in Capgemini Engineering India
* To build the Safety Capability of Capgemini Engineering India
* To develop the Safety Offer of Capgemini Engineering India
* To provide technical safety engineering pre\-sales and bid support to the sales and bid teams as required
* To identify Safety\-related bids and projects in the region
* To put in place appropriate controls on safety related bids and projects in accordance with the PSMS
* To provide technical safety oversight of safety related bids and projects including review and approval of bid and project safety deliverables according to the PSMS, and recommendations for approvals and escalations of issues to the PSMS committee
* To actively contribute to the Capgemini Engineering BL PSMS Committee, which oversees the development, application and maintenance of the PSMS
* To ensure the appropriate legislation and standards are adhered to
* To ensure that suitably qualified and experienced safety resources are allocated to all safety related roles
* To support Safety coordinators in perimeters agreed with the Capgemini Engineering BL Global Safety Authority.
* Support Quality Assurance activities. Defining, implementing and maintaining Quality Management System guided software development life cycles, processes and practices
* Conducting regular reviews of PSMS \& Monthly steering committee reviews with leadership team
* Analysis of reported safety observations and preparation of improvement plans
* Participating in PSSR (Pre\-startup Safety Reviews), ensuring closure of points before startup
* Ensuring PSI (process safety information) is available for all projects
**Our Ideal Candidate**
-----------------------


* 20\+ years of experience in Engineering
* 15\+ years of experience in the application of safety management and/or engineering to safety related/safety critical systems, with experience in activities such as:
* Safety Management/responsibility for ensuring the implementation of a Safety Plan
* Preparation of key safety related documents, e.g., Safety Plan, Safety Cases;
* Conducting Hazard Analysis and risk assessment,
* Application and use of safety analysis techniques to include HAZOP/HAZID, FTA, FMEA, ETA and supporting tools
* Management of Hazard Log
* Derivation and management of safety requirements
* Knowledge of legislation and national/international safety standards (e.g., ISO26262, IEC61508, DO178\)
* Excellent communication skills
* Strong Leadership skills
* Experience in supporting projects as Functional Safety Expert

title: T&T| Engg| Databricks| Mumbai| Consultant
description:
Job requisition ID :: 105137
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Mumbai
Designation: Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**The Team**



Deloitte’s Technology \& Transformation practice can help you uncover and unlock the value buried deep inside vast amounts of data. Our global network provides strategic guidance and implementation services to help companies manage data from disparate sources and convert it into accurate, actionable information that can support fact\-driven decision\-making and generate an insight\-driven advantage. Our practice addresses the continuum of opportunities in business intelligence \& visualization, data management, performance management and next\-generation analytics and technologies, including big data, cloud, cognitive and machine learning.  



**Your work profile**


**Location:** Mumbai



Need **minimum 3\+** years of experience


**Education:** Any graduation


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------



Data Engineering \& Pipeline Development


* Design, develop, and maintain batch and streaming data pipelines using Databricks (Spark SQL, PySpark, Scala).


* Build and optimize data ingestion frameworks using Auto Loader, Delta Live Tables (DLT), and Structured Streaming.


* Implement scalable data solutions on cloud platforms (Azure / AWS / GCP) using Databricks Lakehouse architecture.



Databricks Platform \& Lakehouse


* Work with Delta Lake for ACID transactions, schema enforcement, and time\-travel.


* Develop and optimize ETL/ELT pipelines leveraging Spark best practices.


* Manage data stored across cloud object storage such as ADLS, S3, or GCS.


* Use Unity Catalog for governance, lineage, and access control.



Programming \& Data Processing


* Develop data transformation logic using SQL, PySpark, Spark SQL, or Scala.


* Build reusable frameworks, libraries, and components for data processing workflows.



Orchestration \& Automation


* Orchestrate workflows using Databricks Workflows, Airflow, or equivalent schedulers.


* Integrate Databricks jobs into CI/CD pipelines using Git, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or Jenkins.



Quality, Monitoring \& Performance


* Implement data quality checks using expectations (DLT expectations, QA frameworks).


* Optimize Spark jobs for performance and cost efficiency.


* Troubleshoot data pipeline failures, cluster issues, and performance bottlenecks.



Collaboration \& Delivery


* Work with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand requirements.


* Support data migration projects, such as on\-prem to cloud lakehouse migration.


* Create and maintain documentation, data flow diagrams, and runbooks.


**Required Skills**
-------------------


* Strong hands\-on experience with Databricks (notebooks, jobs, clusters, Workflows).


* Proficiency in PySpark, Spark SQL, and/or Scala.


* Strong SQL skills.


* Understanding of data modeling, lakehouse architecture, and ETL/ELT pipelines.


* Familiarity with cloud platforms (Azure / AWS / GCP).


* Working knowledge of DevOps, Git, and CI/CD practices.


**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------


* Databricks Data Engineer Associate / Professional Certification.


* Experience with Delta Live Tables, Unity Catalog, and MLflow.



 Exposure real\-time streaming using Spark Structured Streaming.


* Experience working in Agile Scrum environments.
