title: Analyst - US Consulting Services
description:
**Associate, Production**


Deloitte leads with purpose, helping solve complex issues for our clients and communities. Across disciplines, we support the US member firm by developing and driving strategy, programs, and platforms that create new solutions and transformational experiences. Our people share a passion for igniting change and a strong service orientation that shapes our organization and those it supports.


**Work you'll do**


As an Associate, Production on the US Consulting Services Knowledge Services team, you will be responsible for:


* Partnering with business stakeholders to maintain, update, and publish content across knowledge platforms
* Publishing, tagging, archiving, and reviewing content in alignment with taxonomy, workflow, brand, and style standards
* Building and updating SharePoint Modern pages using stakeholder\-provided content and guidance from Knowledge Managers
* Coordinating with stakeholders and Knowledge Managers on project planning, reporting, issue tracking, and content improvement opportunities
* Collaborating with subject matter experts and Knowledge Services colleagues to maintain knowledge repositories and support knowledge\-sharing initiatives

**The team**


The US Consulting Services Knowledge Services team supports our practitioners in winning, selling, delivering, connecting, and collaborating with clients and colleagues. We ensure access to the latest and most relevant content while facilitating people connections.


**Location: Bengaluru**


**Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM**


**Qualifications**


Required:


* 0\-3 years of experience in content management, knowledge management, web publishing, or a similar function
* MBA or equivalent Master’s degree with 60% or 6\.5 GPA and above throughout, with no active backlogs
* Experience building or updating SharePoint Modern pages and publishing content in SharePoint Online
* Experience using Microsoft Word and PowerPoint
* Experience reviewing content for completeness, consistency, and adherence to defined standards
* Experience coordinating with stakeholders on reporting, issue tracking, or project planning

Preferred:


* Experience applying taxonomy or workflow requirements to digital content
* Experience supporting knowledge repositories or knowledge\-sharing workflows
* Experience using Microsoft Excel for tracking or reporting
* Experience supporting learning programs or knowledge adoption initiatives


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: .Net Angular
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **.NET Developer**, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and enhancing scalable applications using .NET technologies and Angular\-based frontend solutions. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to deliver high\-quality, robust, and cloud\-enabled applications aligned with business needs and agile practices.


In this role, you will:


* Develop and maintain **full stack applications** using **C\# (.NET Core/.NET 5\+)** and **Angular / MVC** for frontend solutions.
* Design and implement **RESTful APIs** with proper security, monitoring, and documentation using **OpenAPI/Swagger**.
* Build and optimize **database solutions** using **SQL Server** and efficient query design.
* Contribute to **microservices\-based architecture** for scalable and modular application design.
* Integrate and deploy applications on **Azure cloud services**.
* Manage version control and collaboration using **GitHub and TFS**.
* Work within **SAFe/Agile frameworks** to deliver features aligned with program increment (PI) objectives.

**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Experience**


* **4\+ years of experience** in full stack .NET development.
* **Location**: **Bangalore** (Work from office in hybrid mode).
* Strong backend expertise in **C\# (.NET Core / .NET 5\+)**.
* Good hands\-on experience with **Angular (latest versions preferred)** and MVC\-based frontend development.
* Experience in building and consuming **RESTful APIs** with security and monitoring capabilities.
* Strong knowledge of **SQL and SQL Server**.
* Exposure to **microservices architecture** (preferred).
* Familiarity with **Azure (preferred) or AWS cloud platforms**.
* Experience with **GitHub, TFS**, and version control best practices.
* Exposure to **CI/CD pipelines** using tools such as Jenkins or Azure DevOps (good to have).
* Experience with **unit testing (xUnit/NUnit)** and integration testing (good to have).
* Knowledge of **SAFe methodology** is an advantage.
**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on modern **cloud\-enabled full stack applications**.
* Exposure to **Angular, .NET, and Azure\-based enterprise systems**.
* Collaborative Agile work environment with continuous learning and growth.
* Access to upskilling opportunities in **cloud, microservices, and DevOps practices**.

Capgemini is an AI‑powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. --------------------

* The role focuses on platform stability governance performance optimization and enabling scalable analytics solutions across multiple BI tools

title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** Custom Software Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
  

**Must have skills :** Oracle Supply Chain Management (SCM)  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **7\.5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary
  

  

A Level 8 Oracle Supply Chain Management (SCM) role typically involves being a senior functional consultant or principal lead, responsible for end\-to\-end SCM implementations, process optimization, and stakeholder management across modules like Procurement, Inventory, Order Management, Warehouse Management, and Transportation. Candidates are expected to have 8–15 years of experience with Oracle Fusion SCM and deep expertise in supply chain processes.  

  

Key Responsibilities  

  

SCM Implementation – Lead full lifecycle implementations of Oracle Fusion SCM modules (Procurement, Inventory, Order Management, Warehouse Management, Transportation).  

Business Process Analysis – Conduct requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, and design optimized supply chain solutions.  

Configuration \& Optimization – Configure SCM modules to align with business objectives and improve efficiency.  

Documentation – Prepare BRDs, SOPs, process maps, and functional documentation.  

Integration Support – Collaborate with IT teams to integrate SCM with ERP, WMS, and third\-party systems.  

KPI Development – Define supply chain KPIs and build dashboards for operational visibility.  

Change Management – Drive user training, stakeholder engagement, and adoption initiatives.  

Project Leadership – Guide onsite\-offshore teams, manage UAT, data migration, cutover, and hypercare activities.  

  

Required Skills  

  

8–15 years of Oracle SCM experience (Fusion Cloud expertise preferred).  

Strong knowledge of Procure\-to\-Pay and Order\-to\-Cash cycles.  

Hands\-on experience with Inventory, Procurement, Order Management, Warehouse Management, Transportation Management.  

Expertise in requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, and solution design.  

Experience with SCM integrations, data migration, and testing.  

Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.  

Ability to lead teams in onsite\-offshore delivery models.  

Good\-to\-have: Oracle SCM certifications, knowledge of logistics/distribution, and exposure to Oracle Analytics Cloud.  

  

Additional Information  

  

Career Path: Progression to Practice Manager, Solution Architect, or Program Director roles.  

Client Engagement: Direct interaction with senior stakeholders, CXOs, and supply chain leaders.  

Performance Metrics: Success measured by project delivery timelines, cost optimization, and user adoption rates.  

Leadership Expectations: Mentor junior consultants, contribute to knowledge management, and support pre\-sales activities.  

Compensation: Competitive salary with performance\-based incentives, aligned with senior consultant/lead levels.  

Location Flexibility: Roles may be based in major delivery centers or client sites across India and globally, excluding Bengaluru as per requirement.


  

15 years full time education

We are looking for a Total Rewards Specialist to support and execute compensation and benefits strategies in India. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment and is comfortable managing competing priorities.

	+ Review and recommend improvements to Total Rewards policies, processes, and governance frameworks.
	+ Operate effectively in a fast\-paced environment, demonstrating agility, prioritization, and adaptability to evolving business needs.

* + Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Management, or a related field.
	+ Preferably 5\-6 years of experience in Total Rewards, with expertise in compensation and benefits.
	+ Strong analytical skills with the ability to manage complex data sets and provide meaningful insights.
	+ Demonstrated ability to influence and collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams and stakeholders.
	+ Proactive, self\-motivated, and able to work independently in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
	+ Comfortable navigating ambiguity and balancing multiple priorities.

title: Automation QA C1
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Your Role**
-------------


As a **Functional QA Engineer**, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of software products by designing and executing comprehensive test strategies across the software development lifecycle. You will work closely with developers, product owners, and Agile teams to validate application functionality, performance, and integrations while driving continuous quality improvements.


In this role, you will:


* Design and execute **test plans, test scenarios, and test cases** based on acceptance criteria.
* Perform **API testing** using tools such as **Postman or Insomnia** to validate functionality and integrations.
* Conduct **performance testing** using **JMeter or browser developer tools** to identify and resolve bottlenecks.
* Execute **manual testing** including functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing across modules.
* Write **basic SQL queries** for backend validation and data verification.
* Participate in **SAFe ceremonies** and align testing activities with PI objectives.
* Develop and maintain **Cypress automation scripts** where applicable.

**Your Profile**
----------------


### **Experience**


* **6\+ years of experience** in Functional QA and software testing.
* **Location:** Bangalore (Work from Office).

### **Technical Expertise**


* Strong experience in **manual testing** including functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing.
* Hands\-on experience with **API testing tools** such as Postman or Insomnia.
* Experience in **performance testing** using JMeter or browser\-based tools.
* Working knowledge of **SQL for data validation**.
* Exposure to **test automation frameworks (Cypress preferred)** is a plus.
* Familiarity with **AI\-based tools** for test design and documentation.

### **Core Skills**


* Strong understanding of **QA processes and SDLC/STLC** in Agile/SAFe environments.
* Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem‑solving skills.

**What You’ll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------

title: Avaloq Senior Developer - Tech Lead | 9 to 20 Years | Pune
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Avaloq Senior Developer / Tech Lead:**


Capgemini – WealthTech \& AI Practice Capgemini is expanding its WealthTech practice, supporting leading financial institutions in transforming their wealth management platforms. .


We are looking for Senior Avaloq Developers / Tech Leads who want to go beyond pure technical delivery and evolve into true technico\-functional experts — combining deep platform expertise with a strong understanding of wealth management business processes.


**Primary Skills**
------------------

* 10\+ years of Avaloq development experience


* Strong expertise in: o Avaloq parameterization and customization o Avaloq Message Interface (AMI) is an advantage


* Solid knowledge of at least one of the following domains: Trading, Credit \& Loans, Client Lifecyle, Portfolio Management, SWIFT \& Settlement


* Solid experience with: o Oracle / PL\-SQL o Unix / shell scripting


• University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent • Avaloq Certified Professional (ACP) is a strong advantage


* Good understanding of Wealth Management / Private Banking products

title: BSW Tester
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


As a BSW Tester, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and automating test activities for AUTOSAR Basic Software modules. You will work closely with software developers, system architects, and integration teams to ensure robust validation of embedded systems using industry\-leading Vector tools and HIL environments.


**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills:**


* Proven experience in AUTOSAR BSW testing, specifically Diagnostics, COM, and FM modules.
* Hands\-on experience in manual and automated testing of embedded software systems.
* Strong knowledge and practical experience with Hardware\-in\-the\-Loop (HIL) testing.
* Proficiency in Vector tools including CANoe, CANalyzer, CANape, and vTESTstudio.
* Experience in test automation using CAPL, Python, or similar scripting languages.
* Strong debugging, analysis, and problem\-solving skills.
* Understanding of automotive communication protocols such as CAN, LIN, FlexRay, or Ethernet.
* Familiarity with software development lifecycle and automotive validation processes.
**Preferred Skills**
--------------------


* ISTQB or equivalent software testing certification.
* Knowledge of AUTOSAR architecture and methodology.
* Experience with requirements management and defect tracking tools.
* Exposure to ASPICE, ISO 26262, or other automotive quality standards.
**In this role, you will**
--------------------------


* Perform validation and verification of AUTOSAR Basic Software (BSW) modules such as Diagnostics, Communication (COM), and Function Management (FM).
* Develop, execute, and maintain manual and automated test cases for embedded software components.
* Conduct Hardware\-in\-the\-Loop (HIL) testing to validate system functionality under real\-world scenarios.
* Utilize Vector toolchain including CANoe, CANalyzer, CANape, and vTESTstudio for testing, simulation, and analysis activities.
* Design and implement automation frameworks and test scripts using CAPL, Python, or equivalent scripting languages.
* Analyze test results, identify defects, and collaborate with development teams for issue resolution.
* Support integration, regression, and release testing activities.
* Prepare test reports, maintain documentation, and ensure compliance with automotive quality standards.
**What You'll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge automotive embedded systems and AUTOSAR platforms.
* Exposure to advanced testing environments and industry\-leading Vector tools.
* Collaborative work culture with experienced automotive engineering teams.
* Continuous learning and growth through challenging projects and emerging vehicle technologies.
* Flexible work environment that encourages innovation and technical excellence
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: Manager | Oracle Cloud Infra | Bengaluru | Oracle
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108546
Date: Jul 14, 2026
Location: Bengaluru
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
Job Title: Manager – Oracle Integration Cloud

* Experience

  

7\-14 Years

* Location


Hyderabad, Bangalore

* Job Summary


We are looking for an experienced Oracle Integration Cloud Manager to lead the design, development, and delivery of enterprise integration solutions across Oracle Cloud and external enterprise applications. The ideal candidate should possess strong technical expertise in Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), Oracle ERP Cloud Applications, Oracle Database technologies, and enterprise integration architecture, along with proven experience managing technical teams and delivering large\-scale integration programs.

  

The role requires a blend of solution architecture, technical leadership, stakeholder management, and hands\-on delivery experience for high\-volume, mission\-critical integrations.

* Key Responsibilities

* Lead end\-to\-end integration solution design, development, and implementation using Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC).
* Architect scalable, secure, and high\-performance integration solutions for Oracle Fusion Cloud and third\-party applications.
* Design integration strategies for batch, real\-time, asynchronous, and event\-driven business processes.
* Lead technical teams through architecture reviews, code reviews, performance optimization, and production support.
* Work closely with business stakeholders, functional consultants, enterprise architects, and project managers to define integration roadmaps.
* Drive technical governance, coding standards, reusable integration frameworks, and best practices.
* Design and implement high\-volume, high\-throughput integration solutions capable of processing large transactional workloads with optimal performance and reliability.
* Perform effort estimation, solution planning, technical risk assessment, and capacity planning.
* Mentor development teams and provide technical leadership throughout the project lifecycle.
* Support proposal development, solutioning, client presentations, and pre\-sales activities whenever required.

* Mandatory Technical Skills

* Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC)

  

Strong hands\-on experience in Oracle Integration Cloud


OIC Adapters


Hands\-on experience working with:

* ERP Adapter
* HCM Adapter
* REST Adapter
* SOAP Adapter
* FTP/SFTP Adapter
* Database Adapter
* File Adapter
* OCI Object Storage Adapter
* Email Adapter


Experience with Oracle Visual Builder Cloud Service (VBCS) for developing extensions and custom applications for Oracle Fusion Cloud.


Proven experience designing and implementing enterprise\-grade integrations involving:

* Large\-volume data migration
* High transaction throughput
* Bulk data processing
* Parallel processing
* File chunking and batching strategies
* Database performance optimization
* Integration performance tuning
* Scalability and resiliency design
* Monitoring and recovery mechanisms

* Oracle Cloud Applications

  

Strong understanding of Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications, including experience in one or more functional areas:

* Supply Chain Management (SCM)
* Order Management
* Procurement
* Inventory
* Manufacturing
* Product Data Hub (PDH)
* Product Information Management (PIM)
* Financials
* Human Capital Management (HCM)

  

Knowledge of Oracle Cloud business processes and SaaS integration capabilities is expected.

* Oracle Database


Excellent knowledge of Oracle Database including:

* SQL
* PL/SQL
* Stored Procedures
* Packages
* Functions
* Performance Tuning
* Exception Handling
* Collections
* Bulk Processing
* MERGE Operations
* Analytical Functions

  

Reporting \& Data Extraction

  

Experience with:

* BI Publisher (BIP)
* BICC Extracts
* OTBI
* Oracle Enterprise Scheduler (ESS)

  

Integration Architecture

  

Strong understanding of:

* Enterprise Integration Patterns
* API\-first Design
* Microservices Architecture
* Event\-driven Architecture
* Messaging Patterns
* Error Handling Frameworks
* Retry Mechanisms
* Idempotency
* Logging \& Monitoring
* Integration Security
* API Versioning

* Security

  

Hands\-on experience with:

* OAuth 2\.0
* JWT
* Basic Authentication
* SSL/TLS
* Certificates
* API Security
* Identity Management

* Leadership Responsibilities

* Lead and mentor integration teams.
* Conduct technical design and code reviews.
* Define development standards and reusable frameworks.
* Manage technical delivery across multiple concurrent projects.
* Coordinate with client architects, functional teams, and offshore/onshore delivery teams.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives and technical innovation.

* Nice to Have

  

Experience with one or more of the following:

* Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)
* Oracle SOA Suite
* DevOps and CI/CD pipelines (Git, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions)
* Kafka or other enterprise messaging platforms

* Preferred Qualifications

* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.
* Oracle Integration Cloud certifications are preferred.
* Oracle Cloud Applications certifications are an advantage.

* Desired Candidate Profile

* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
* Ability to lead distributed technical teams.
* Experience working in Agile delivery environments.
* Strong customer\-facing consulting experience.
* Ability to drive architecture discussions and influence technical decisions.
* Self\-driven with a strong focus on quality, delivery, and continuous improvement.

title: Tableau Admin
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* As a Consultant specializing in Tableau Administration you will be at the heart of how data comes to life for our business stakeholders
* In this role you will own and optimize our Tableau environment ensuring it is secure scalable and high performing for users across the organization
* You will collaborate closely with analysts developers and business teams to enable self service analytics streamline governance and maintain a robust BI ecosystem
* With your 5 9 years of experience you will guide best practices troubleshoot complex issues and help shape the roadmap for our visualization and reporting platforms
* This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys combining technical depth with stakeholder interaction and who is passionate about empowering others to make data driven decisions in a collaborative supportive environment

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Manage Tableau Server Cloud environments Install configure upgrade and maintain Tableau Server Cloud including nodes services and background processes
* Ensure performance and availability Monitor server health optimize performance manage capacity and ensure high availability and reliability of the Tableau platform
* Security and governance Configure authentication and authorization manage users groups and permissions and enforce governance standards for content and data access
* Content management Oversee workbooks data sources projects and schedules implement folder structures and naming conventions manage lifecycle of dashboards and reports
* Data source and extract management Configure and manage data connections extracts refresh schedules and troubleshoot related failures
* Troubleshooting and support Provide L2 L3 support for Tableau related issues analyze logs resolve performance bottlenecks and coordinate with vendors when needed
* Backup recovery and upgrades Implement backup and restore strategies plan and execute upgrades and patches with minimal downtime
* Best practices and standards Define and promote Tableau development and usage standards including performance optimization security and content organization
* Collaboration with stakeholders Partner with BI developers data engineers and business users to understand requirements and ensure the platform meets evolving needs
* Documentation and training Maintain technical documentation runbooks and provide guidance or knowledge sharing sessions for users and development teams

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Primary skills Technology Administration Visualization Tableau Administration

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Minimum Qualifications
* Education Bachelor s degree in Computer Science Information Technology Engineering or a related field
* Experience 5 9 years of overall IT experience with significant hands on experience in Tableau Administration in production environments
* Core expertise
* Strong proficiency in installing configuring and administering Tableau Server Cloud
* Proven experience managing users groups permissions and security policies in Tableau
* Solid understanding of Tableau extracts data sources and scheduling refreshes
* Experience monitoring and tuning Tableau Server performance and resource utilization
* Ability to troubleshoot Tableau platform issues using logs and admin views

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Administration Visualization\-\>Tableau Administration
